MAT 1:1 Gan â nego amariina gi ikishoko k…®n â Y…®…®su Kiriisit â aaruuriir…®. Y…®…®su Kiriisit â akarw…®ra murwibh âr â rw â  âm ât…®mi Daudi ni ikishoko cha Abhurahaamu.
MAT 1:2 Abhurahaamu akiibh âra Iisaka, Iisaka akiibh âra Yaakobho, Yaakobho akiibh âra Yuuda na abhahiiri bhaaz…®.
MAT 1:3 Yuuda akiibh âra P…®r…®…®si na Zeera kwa Tamaari, P…®r…®…®si akiibh âra H…®zir â âni, H…®zir â âni akiibh âra Araamu,
MAT 1:4 Araamu akiibh âra Aminadaabhu, Aminadaabhu akiibh âra Nash âni, Nash âni akiibh âra Sarim â âni,
MAT 1:5 Sarim â âni akiibh âra Bhoowazi kwa Rahaabhu, Bhoowazi akiibh âra …Ñbh…®…®di kwa Ruutu, …Ñbh…®…®di akiibh âra Yeese,
MAT 1:6 na Yeese akiibh âra  âm ât…®mi Daudi. Daudi akiibh âra S…®r…®maani k âm âkari w ân â aar…® k âbha  âm âkari wa Uriya,
MAT 1:7 S…®r…®maani akiibh âra Rehobhowamu, Rehobhowamu akiibh âra Abhiya, Abhiya akiibh âra Asa,
MAT 1:8 Asa akiibh âra Yehoshafaati, Yehoshafaati akiibh âra Yoraamu, Yoraamu akiibh âra Uziya,
MAT 1:9 Uziya akiibh âra Yosamu, Yosamu akiibh âra Ahaazi, Ahaazi akiibh âra H…®z…®kiya,
MAT 1:10 H…®z…®kiya akiibh âra Manaas…®, Manaas…® akiibh âra Am âni, Am âni akiibh âra Y âsiya,
MAT 1:11 na Y âsiya akiibh âra Y…®k âniya na bhaumwabh â. Ribhaga r…®kah…®ta, Abhiizira…®ri bhakagwatwa, bhakahirwa mobhohocha muchar â cha Bhaabh…®…®ri.
MAT 1:12 Han â Abhiizira…®ri bhaamarir…® k âsaamibhwa iyo, Y…®k âniya akiibh âra Sheyaritiy…®ri, Sheyaritiy…®ri akiibh âra Z…®rubhabh…®…®ri,
MAT 1:13 Z…®rubhabh…®…®ri akiibh âra Abhihudi, Abhihudi akiibh âra ∆óriyakimu, ∆óriyakimu akiibh âra Az âri,
MAT 1:14 Az âri akiibh âra Zad âki, Zad âki akiibh âra Akimu, Akimu akiibh âra ∆óriudi,
MAT 1:15 ∆óriudi akiibh âra ∆ór…®azaari, ∆ór…®azaari akiibh âra Matani, Matani akiibh âra Yaakobho,
MAT 1:16 Yaakobho akiibh âra Yuusufu, umusubh…® wa Mariyamu, na Mariyamu akiibh âra Y…®…®su w ân â akubhirikirwa Kiriisit â.
MAT 1:17 Mmbe, kurwa kwa Abhurahaamu kuhik…®ra ukwibhurwa k â  âm ât…®mi Daudi kwar…® na zinyibh âr â ikumi ni iny…®. Na kurwa kwa Daudi kuhik…®ra ribhaga r…®n â Abhiizira…®ri bhaasaamiibhw…® mobhohocha muchar â cha Bhaabh…®…®ri, kwar…® na zinyibh âr â …®z…®nd…® ikumi ni iny…®. Na kurwa ribhaga r…®n â bhasaamiibhw…® iyo kuhik…®ra ukwibhurwa kwa Kiriisit â, kwar…® na zinyibh âr â …®z…®nd…® ikumi ni iny…®.
MAT 1:18 Gan â nego amang ºana gu ukwibhurwa kwa Y…®…®su Kiriisit â. Mariyamu unina Y…®…®su, aar…® arunjibhw…® na Yuusufu. Nawe han â aar…® ak…®…®r…® kuryakara, Mariyamu akagega …®nda k âbh ânaja bhwe Ekoro ∆ónd…®ndu.
MAT 1:19 Yuusufu umusubh…® waaz…®, aar…®  âm â ât â we eheene m âbh âtang…® bhwa Mungu. At…®…®ndir…® asuuch…® Mariyamu, k âgayo akeenda amwang…® kimbisi.
MAT 1:20 Nawe, han â Yuusufu aar…® ariiseega gayo, rogendo r âmw…® maraika w â …Ñm âk âr â Mungu akamuhwar âk…®ra mokerooto, akam âbh â âr…®ra, ‚ÄúYuusufu, umwana w â  âm ât…®mi Daudi,  ât â âbhaha kukw…®ra Mariyamu, k â k âbha …®nda yaaz…® ayibhw…®n…® k âbh ânaja bhwe Ekoro ∆ónd…®ndu.
MAT 1:21 Ariibh âra umwana wi ikisubh…®, naaw…®  âm âr âk…® Y…®…®su, k â k âbha wuyo newe araasabh âr…® abhaat â bhaaz…® kurwa m âbh âbh…® bhwabh â.‚Äù
MAT 1:22 Gayo g â âsi gaak âriibhw…®, korereke r…®bh…® ring ºana r…®n â …Ñm âk âr â Mungu aagambir…® k ânz…®ra y â  âm âr â ât…®r…®ri k âbha,
MAT 1:23 ‚ÄúRora, umusiiti aragega …®nda, neewe ariibh âra umwana wi ikisubh…®. Ararukwa ∆ómaanw…®ri.‚Äù Enzobhooro yaku, Mungu hamw…®mw…® na niitw…®.
MAT 1:24 Han â Yuusufu aabhuukir…®, akakora ch…®mbu maraika w â …Ñm âk âr â Mungu aamubhuuriir…®. Akakw…®ra Mariyamu,
MAT 1:25 nawe atar…®…®r…® neewe kuhika han â Mariyamu iit â âr…®…®n ºy…®. Akam âr âka umwana wuyo, Y…®…®su.
MAT 2:1 Y…®…®su akiibhurwa m âr âbh…®ri rwa Bh…®t…®r…®h…®…®mu muchar â cha Yudeya, ribhaga r…®n â Heroode aar…®  âm ât…®mi. Ribhaga riyo, abham…®nyi bha zenzota bhan â bhaaruur…® r âg âr â, bhakahika m âr âbh…®ri rwa Y…®rusar…®…®mu. Bhakabhuurya,
MAT 2:2 ‚ÄúAr…® hayi umwana w ân â ibhwirw…® abh…®  âm ât…®mi wa Abhayaahudi? T âm…®nyir…® ibhwirw…®, k â k âbha enzota yaaz…® …®karorekana kwa niitw…® r âg âr â, twizir…® komosengera.‚Äù
MAT 2:3 Han â  âm ât…®mi Heroode iigwir…® amang ºana gaabh â, akahaha, hamw…®mw…® na abhaat â bh â âsi bha Y…®rusar…®…®mu.
MAT 2:4 Neho Heroode akabhiringa abhak âr â bh â âsi bha abhakuhaani na abhiija bhi imigir â ja Musa, akabhabhuurya, ‚ÄúKiriisit â ariibhurwa hayi?‚Äù
MAT 2:5 Bhakam âgarukirya, ‚ÄúAriibhurwa m âr âbh…®ri rwa Bh…®t…®r…®h…®…®mu muchar â cha Yudeya. T âm…®nyir…® riyo, k â k âbha Mungu akagamba k âh…®t…®ra  âm âr â ât…®r…®ri k âbha,
MAT 2:6 ‚ÄòImw…® abhaat â bha Bh…®t…®r…®h…®…®mu muchar â cha Yuuda, m âtar…® bha koregwa m âbh âkangati bhwi ichar â cha Yuuda, k â k âbha kurwa kwa niimw…® arah âr âka  âm âkangati w ân â ak âkangata abhaat â bhaan…® bha Izira…®ri, nchu umuriisha akuriisha z…®ng º ându zaaz…®.‚Äô‚Ää‚Äù
MAT 2:7 Neho Heroode akabh…®r…®k…®ra abham…®nyi bha zenzota bhayo kwa mbisi, korereke bhaaz…® bham âbh â âr…®r…® bhwaheene ribhaga r…®n â bhaar â âz…® enzota.
MAT 2:8 Ak âmara, akabhat âma Bh…®t…®r…®h…®…®mu, akabhabh â âr…®ra, ‚ÄúMuj…® mubhuuririry…® bhwaheene, kuhika momenye han â umwana wuyo ar…®. Han â m âraamobhone mondeetere amang ºana bhwang â korereke na niiny…® nij…® komosengera.‚Äù
MAT 2:9 Han â abham…®nyi bha zenzota bhiigwir…® amang ºana g â  âm ât…®mi, bhakabh â âka. Rogendo r âmw…®, enzota y…®n â bhaar â âz…® r âg âr â …®kabhakangat…®ra, ikiim…®…®r…®ra han â umwana aar…®.
MAT 2:10 Han â bhaar â âz…® enzota yiyo, bhakazomerwa bh âk âng ºu.
MAT 2:11 Bhakasik…®ra munyumba, bhakarora umwana na Mariyamu unina, bhakahigama kosengera umwana. Bhakataz âra imirig â jabh â, bhakaha umwana  âm âbhan â gw…® …®zahaabhu, umurumbas â na man…®man…®.
MAT 2:12 Mmbe, Mungu akabhahama mobherooto k âbha, bhatagar âka kwik…® kwa Heroode. Bhakah âr âk…®ra …®nz…®ra y…®nd…® k âgar âka …®waabh â.
MAT 2:13 Han â abham…®nyi bha zenzota bhayo bhaagiir…®, maraika w â …Ñm âk âr â Mungu akahwar âk…®ra Yuusufu mokerooto. Akam âbh â âr…®ra, ‚ÄúBh â âka! Ogege umwana na unina, ong ºosere muchar â cha Miisiri. M âsaag…® iyo kuhika han â n…®raak âbh â âr…®r…®  âgar âk…®, k â k âbha Heroode aramohya umwana areenda amwit…®.‚Äù
MAT 2:14 Mmbe, Yuusufu akabh â âka ubhutik â bhuyobhuyo, akagega m âkaaz…® nu umwana, akang ºosera Miisiri.
MAT 2:15 Bhakahika Miisiri, bhakiikara iyo kuhika han â Heroode aakuur…®. Amang ºana gayo gakak âribhwa, korereke r…®bh…® ring ºana r…®n â …Ñm âk âr â Mungu aagambir…® k ânz…®ra y â  âm âr â ât…®r…®ri waaz…®, ‚ÄúN…®kam âbh…®r…®k…®ra umwana waan…® kurwa Miisiri.‚Äù
MAT 2:16 Han â Heroode aam…®nyir…® k âbha abham…®nyi bha zenzota bharya bham âkangiriiry…®, akiigatana bh âk âng ºu. Neho akat âma abhasirikar…® bhaaz…® Bh…®t…®r…®h…®…®mu hamw…®mw…® na ahagero h â âsi ha haguh…®, akabhaswaja k âbha bhiit…® abhaana bhi ikisubh…® bh â âsi bhi imyaka …®bh…®r…® k âgar âka iyaas…®. Akakorabhu k âr…®ng ºaana na ribhaga r…®n â aabhuuriirw…® na abham…®nyi bha zenzota.
MAT 2:17 Neho r…®kabha ring ºana r…®n â  âm âr â ât…®r…®ri Y…®r…®miya aagambir…®,
MAT 2:18 ‚Äú∆ók…®r…®r â k…®kabhoneka m âr âbh…®ri rwa Raama, …®k…®r…®r â nu ukwarama kwaru. Rah…®…®ri arar…®r…®ra abhaana bhaaz…®, …®n â atakwenda k âh ânibhwa, k â k âbha abhaana bhaaz…® bhatareeho.‚Äù
MAT 2:19 Han â Heroode aamarir…® kukwa, maraika w â …Ñm âk âr â Mungu akamuhwar âk…®ra Yuusufu mokerooto Miisiri,
MAT 2:20 akam âbh â âr…®ra, ‚ÄúBh â âka! Ogege umwana na unina, m âgar âk…® muchar â cha Izira…®ri, k â k âbha bhan â bhaar…® bhareenda kwita umwana wuyo, bhakuur…®.‚Äù
MAT 2:21 Mmbe, Yuusufu akabh â âka, akagega umwana na unina, akagar âka muchar â cha Izira…®ri.
MAT 2:22 Nawe han â iigwir…® k âbha Arik…®ra â umwana wa Heroode aar…® arakangata Yudeya, ak â âbhaha kujay â. Han â Mungu aamubhuuriir…® mokerooto ataja iyo naatu, akaja muchar â cha Gariraaya.
MAT 2:23 Bhakahika m âr âbh…®ri rwa Nazar…®…®ti, bhakiikara iyo. Neho ring ºana r…®kabha r…®n â ryagambirw…® ig âr â wa Y…®…®su k ânz…®ra ya abhar â ât…®r…®ri, ‚ÄúArabhirikirwa M ânazar…®…®ti.‚Äù
MAT 3:1 Zisik â nzaru z…®n â zihitir…®, aareho  âm â ât â w âmw…® w ân â akubhirikirwa Yoohana …Ñm âbhatiizi. Aar…® ararwaza mwit…®r…®g â rya Yudeya arabhuga,
MAT 3:2 ‚ÄúMutig…®  âbh âbh…® bhwanyu, k â k âbha  âbh ât…®mi bhwa mwisaar â bh âraariir…®.‚Äù
MAT 3:3 Newe aagambirw…® n â  âm âr â ât…®r…®ri Isaaya, ‚ÄúRiraka ry â  âm â ât â w ân â ak âragan ºya mwit…®r…®g â, ‚ÄòMokonze …®nz…®ra y â …Ñm âk âr â, mogorore …®bh…®h…®t â bhyaz…®.‚Äô‚Ää‚Äù
MAT 3:4 Yoohana aar…® ibh âhir…®  âbh âz â âk…® bhw…® …®ngamiya no omokena gwa riseero mukiribhizi. Ibhyakurya bhyaz…® bhyar…® zingig…® nu ubhw âk…® bhwa mwit…®r…®g â.
MAT 3:5 Abhaat â kurwa  âr âbh…®ri rwa Y…®rusar…®…®mu, ichar â cha Yudeya ch âsi, na z…®mbaara z â âsi z…® …®k…®taar â cha Yorodaani, bhakabha bharamujaku.
MAT 3:6 Bhakatiga  âbh âbh…® bhwabh â, akabhabhatiiza m âk…®taar â cha Yorodaani.
MAT 3:7 Nawe han â Yoohana aar â âz…® Abhafarisaayo na Abhasadukaayo bhaaru bharamujaku korereke abhabhatiiz…®, akabhabh â âr…®ra, ‚ÄúImw…® urwibh âr â rwe enzoka! W…®…®w…® abhabhuuriir…® m ârat âra kong ºosa …®t…®n…®r â ya Mungu y…®n â ikuuza?
MAT 3:8 Mmbe, mokore amahocha gan â gakwereken ºya k âbha mutigir…®  âbh âbh…®.
MAT 3:9 Mutiikangirirya naatu m ârabhuga, ‚ÄòS â âk âr â w…®…®t â, n…®‚ÄëAbhurahaamu!‚Äô N…®rabhabh â âr…®ra k âbha, Mungu arat âra kuch âra amabhw…® gan â gabh…® abhaana bha Abhurahaamu!
MAT 3:10 Nang â …®t…®n…®r â ya Mungu iri ig âr â waanyu nch…® …®haazi iri ig âr â wa amatina g…® …®m…®t…®. Na bhan â bhatakokora amahocha amaz âmu bharatinirwa, ch…®mbu …®m…®t…® j âsi g…®n â g…®takwibh âra imisum â …®m…®z âmu g…®haatinwa na k âtaashwa momorero.
MAT 3:11 ‚ÄúIny…® n…®rabhabhatiiza na amanzi kwerecha k âbha mwichuriir…® Mungu. Nawe araaza  âm â ât â w â  âbh ânaja k ânk…®ra. N…®takwenderwa n â âr â k âtaz âra zisiri zi ibhikw…®ra bhyaz…®. Ewe arabhabhatiiza kwe Ekoro ∆ónd…®ndu na komorero.
MAT 3:12 Na agwatiriir…®  âr âh âng â m âmabhoko gaaz…®, korereke aseese …®ngan â. ∆óngan â yiyo arayikum…®ng…®ra m âk…®tara chaz…®. Nawe  âm âk â âny â, aragwocha momorero g ân â g âtakurima zee.‚Äù
MAT 3:13 Mmbe, ribhaga riyo, Y…®…®su akarwa Gariraaya, akaja m âk…®taar â cha Yorodaani korereke Yoohana am âbhatiiz…®.
MAT 3:14 Nawe Yoohana akagema komorecha, aram âbh â âr…®ra, ‚ÄúNiiny…® nikwenderwa k âbhatiizwa na naaw…®, ndora  âraaza kwa niiny…®?‚Äù
MAT 3:15 Y…®…®su akam âgarukirya, ‚ÄúAw…® wiisiriry…® onyoje  âbh âbh…® nangw…®n â, k â k âbha toreenderwa tokore eheene y â âsi y…®n â Mungu akwenda.‚Äù Neho Yoohana akiisirirya.
MAT 3:16 Han â Y…®…®su aabhatiizirw…® na kurwa m âmanzi, rogendo r âmw…® risaar â rikiig âka, akarora Ekoro ya Mungu iriika nchi ikiguuti na kwikara ig âr â waaz…®.
MAT 3:17 Neho, riraka r…®karwa mwisaar â r…®rabhuga, ‚ÄúW ân â ni‚ÄëMwana waan…®  âm âs…®…®gwa, n…®z âm…®r…®…®rw…® nawe.‚Äù
MAT 4:1 Ak âmara, Y…®…®su akakangatwa ne Ekoro ∆ónd…®ndu kuja mwit…®r…®g â korereke agemwe na Sh…®taani.
MAT 4:2 Akamara iyo sik â merongo ene, ubhutik â nu umwise ariiyima kurya ibhyakurya. ∆ót…®n…®r â, akiigwa …®nzara.
MAT 4:3 Neho Sh…®taani akaaza komogema. Akam âbh â âr…®ra, ‚ÄúAr…®…®bh…® aw…® ni‚ÄëMwana wa Mungu, swaja amabhw…® gan â gabh…® …®m…®kaat…®.‚Äù
MAT 4:4 Nawe Y…®…®su akabhuga, ‚ÄúYandikirw…® m âMaand…®k â Amar…®ndu, ‚Äò…Ñm â ât â atakwikara kwa bhyakurya ibhyene, nawe kwa amang ºana gan â gakurwa kwa Mungu.‚Äô‚Äù
MAT 4:5 Ak âmara Sh…®taani akamuhira m âr âbh…®ri  âr âr…®ndu rwa Y…®rusar…®…®mu, akamwimiirirya k âk…®k âng â cha rihekaaru,
MAT 4:6 akam âbh â âr…®ra, ‚ÄúAr…®…®bh…® aw…® ni‚ÄëMwana wa Mungu, irekera haas…®, k â k âbha yandikirw…®, ‚ÄòMungu araswaja bhamaraika bhaaz…® ig âr â waaz â, ebho bharakugwat…®r…®ra, korereke amag âr â gaaz â gataaza kwitema kwibhw…®.‚Äô‚Ää‚Äù
MAT 4:7 Nawe Y…®…®su akam âbh â âr…®ra, ‚ÄúYandikirw…®, ‚Äò…Ñtagema …Ñm âk âr â Mungu waaz â.‚Äô‚Ää‚Äù
MAT 4:8 Ak âmara, Sh…®taani akamuhira kosonga y…® …®k…®g âr â …®k…®r…®…®hu. Akamwerecha  âbh ât…®mi bhwa z…®…®s…® z â âsi nu ubhuniibhi bhwaz â,
MAT 4:9 akam âbh â âr…®ra, ‚Äú…Ñraanhigam…®r…® na konsengera, n…®rakoha bhy âsi bh…®n â.‚Äù
MAT 4:10 Nawe Y…®…®su akam âbh â âr…®ra, ‚ÄúNuurw…® han â, Sh…®taani! Yandikirw…®, ‚ÄòOsengere …Ñm âk âr â Mungu waaz â, na omohokerye ewe umwene.‚Äô‚Ää‚Äù
MAT 4:11 Neho Sh…®taani akamutiga hayo. Hayohayo bhamaraika bhakaaza kumwangar…®ra.
MAT 4:12 Han â Y…®…®su iigwir…® k âbha Yoohana …Ñm âbhatiizi abh âhirw…® mokebhoho, akaja muchar â cha Gariraaya.
MAT 4:13 Gariraaya iyo, akasaama Nazar…®…®ti, akaja kwikara m âr âbh…®ri rwa Kap…®rinaumu. Kap…®rinaumu iri rusiz â w…® …®nyanza ya Gariraaya,  âr âbhaara rw…® …®bh…®gamb â bhya Zabhur â âni na Naafutaari.
MAT 4:14 ∆ókabhabhu, korereke r…®bh…® ring ºana r…®n â Mungu aagambir…® k âh…®t…®ra kw â  âm âr â ât…®r…®ri Isaaya,

MAR 6:1 Neho Y…®…®su akarw…®y â, akagar âka k âr âbh…®ri rwabh â rwa Nazar…®…®ti hamw…®mw…® na abh…®…®ga bhaaz…®.

MAR 6:3 W ân â atar…®  âm âs…®r…®mara wurya, mura wa Mariyamu, na bhaumwabh â n…®‚ÄëYaakobho, Yoose, Yuuda na Sim â âni? Na abhasubhaati bhaaz…® t âtaanabh â han â?‚Äù Bhakiigatana ig âr â waaz…®, bhakaanga kumwisirirya.
MAR 6:4 Y…®…®su akabhabh â âr…®ra, ‚Äú…Ñm âr â ât…®r…®ri ahaasuukwa ahand…® h â âsi, kuruushaku m âr âbh…®ri rwaz…®, k âbhahiiri bhaaz…® nu uwaaz…®.‚Äù

MAR 6:12 Abh…®…®ga bharya bhakabh â âka, bhakatanga k âbharwaz…®ra abhaat â k âbha, bhatig…®  âbh âbh…® bhwabh â.

MAR 16:20 Abh…®…®ga bhaaz…® bharya bhakabh â âka, bhakaja kurwaza ∆óng ºana ∆ónz âmu hagero h â âsi. …Ñm âk âr â Y…®…®su aar…® arabhaha amanaga go okokora ibhy…®r…®k…®n ºy â. N…®mbu aar…® aramenyeekererya amang ºana gayo k âbha n…®‚Äëga amaheene.]
LUK 1:1 Umugungwa T…® âfir â, garya gaak ârirw…® gat…® w…®…®t â, abhaat â bhaaru bhak ârir…® umucha gu ukwand…®ka ig âr â wa amang ºana gayo.

LUK 2:21 Han â umwana wuyo aahichiry…® sik â inyany…®, bhakam âsaara, bhakam âr âka Y…®…®su. Neryo iriina maraika aam âh…®…®r…®, han â unina aar…® ak…®…®r…® kogega …®nda.
LUK 2:22 Yuusufu na Mariyamu, bhakamara zisik â zaabh â z â  âk âbh…®ngukibhwa, ch…®mburya imigir â ja Musa g…®r…®. Bhakahira Y…®…®su Y…®rusar…®…®mu, korereke bham ât â âr…® m âbh âtang…® bhw â …Ñm âk âr â Mungu.

LUK 4:13 Han â Sh…®taani aamarir…® komogema, akamutiga kwibhaga irebhe.
LUK 4:14 Ak âmara, Y…®…®su akagar âka Gariraaya, izwir…® amanaga ge Ekoro ∆ónd…®ndu. Na amang ºana ig âr â waaz…® gakanyaragana bh âk âng ºu muchar â kiyo ch âsi.
LUK 4:15 Akaja ariija abhaat â m âmarwaz…®r â gaabh â, bh â âsi bhakabha bharamukumya.
LUK 4:16 Neho akagar âka Nazar…®…®ti, m âr âbh…®ri r ân â aar…®rirw…®. Urusik â rw â  âbh ât â âr â, akasik…®ra mwirwaz…®r â, ch…®mbu gaar…® amanar â gaaz…®, akiim…®…®r…®ra kosoma …®ng ºana ya Mungu.
LUK 4:17 Akahaabhwa …®k…®tabh â k…®n â chandikirw…® n â  âm âr â ât…®r…®ri Isaaya, akakihumbura, akabhona ahagero han â haandikirw…®,
LUK 4:18 ‚ÄúEkoro y â …Ñm âk âr â Mungu, …®r…® hamw…® na niiny…®. Amarir…® kondobhora n…®bharwaz…®r…® abhahabh…® ∆óng ºana ∆ónz âmu. Antumir…® k âbhabh â âr…®ra abhabhohwa,  âk âtazurwa kwabh â, na abhah âku, bhararora naatu, na bhan â bhak ânyaakibhwa, bharasabhurwa.
LUK 4:19 Na antumir…® n…®bharwaz…®r…® abhaat â ribhaga ry…® …®bh…®g ângi bhy â …Ñm âk âr â Mungu.‚Äù
LUK 4:20 Han â aamarir…® kosoma amang ºana gayo, Y…®…®su akakundikirya …®k…®tabh â, akagarukirya omohocha, akiikara atang…® kwija. Abhaat â bh â âsi bhan â bhaar…® mwirwaz…®r â muyo, bhaar…® bham âkandikijiry…® am…®…®s â.

LUK 4:22 Amang ºana gaaz…® amaz âmu, gakagirya abhaat â bh â âsi bhamukumy…®, bhakar âg â âra. Bhakatanga kwibhuurya, ‚ÄúW ân â atar…® mwana wa Yuusufu?‚Äù

LUK 4:25 ‚ÄúNawe amaheene n…®rabhabh â âr…®ra, ribhaga rya ∆ó…®riya, imbura …®taatw…®kir…® myaka …®tat â na my…®ri …®saasabha, kuhika …®nzara …®kasik…®ra muchar â ch âsi cha Izira…®ri. Na momenye, bhaareho abhakwirwa bhaaru muchar â ribhaga riyo.
LUK 4:26 N â âr âbhu, ∆ó…®riya ataatumirw…® naabha kwa w âmw…® waabh â, nawe, akatumwa kumukwirwa w âmw…® w â  âr âbh…®ri rwa Sar…®…®puta, muchar â cha Sid â âni, ig ât â wa Izira…®ri!

LUK 6:1 Rusik â r âmw…® rw â  âbh ât â âr â, Y…®…®su na abh…®…®ga bhaaz…®, bhaar…® bharah…®ta m âm…®g ând â j…® …®ngan â. Abh…®…®ga bhaaz…®, bhakabha bharat…®na …®bh…®gara bhy…® …®ngan â, bhakaruushaku zeeheke, bhakarya.
LUK 6:2 Neho Abhafarisaayo abhand…® bhakabhabhuurya, ‚ÄúNdora m ârakora emeremo g…®n â g…®takwenderwa kokorwa urusik â rw â  âbh ât â âr â?‚Äù
LUK 6:3 Y…®…®su akabhagarukirya, ‚ÄúM âtas âmir…® m âMaand…®k â Amar…®ndu ch…®mbu Daudi na abhak…®ndichaz…® bhaak ârir…®, han â bhaar…® n…® …®nzara?
LUK 6:4 Akasik…®ra mwibhuru rir…®ndu rya Mungu, akagega …®m…®kaat…® g…®n â jat…®…®rw…® m âbh âtang…® bhwa Mungu akarya akabhaha na abhak…®ndichaz…® bh â âsi bhakarya. Nawe …®m…®kaat…® g…®n â kumigir â ja Musa g…®takwenderwa kuriibhwa na abhaat â, kuruushaku bhakuhaani abheene.‚Äù
LUK 6:5 Akoongera kubhuga, ‚ÄúUmwana w â …Ñm â ât â, newe …Ñm âk âr â wu urusik â rw â  âbh ât â âr â.‚Äù
LUK 6:6 Urusik â  âr ând…® rw â  âbh ât â âr â, Y…®…®su akasik…®ra mwirwaz…®r â, akiija abhaat â. Muyo, aar…®mu  âm â ât â w âmw…®, w ân â aar…® akuur…® okobhoko ku ubhury â.
LUK 6:7 Abhiija bhi imigir â na Abhafarisaayo, bhakabha bharar…®nda bharore ar…®…®bh…® arahorya  âm â ât â wuyo, urusik â rw â  âbh ât â âr â, k â k âbha bhaar…® bharamohya …®nz…®ra yu ukumwinatiriryaku.
LUK 6:8 Nawe, Y…®…®su akamenya eseemyo yaabh â, akabh â âr…®ra omorema wo okobhoko, ‚ÄúNauz…®, wiim…®…®r…®r…® gat…®gat…®.‚Äù …Ñm â ât â wuyo akaaza, akiim…®…®r…®ra.
LUK 6:9 Ak âmara Y…®…®su akabh â âr…®ra Abhafarisaayo na abhiija bhi imigir â bhayo, ‚ÄúMmbe, n…®bhabhuury…®! Urusik â rw â  âbh ât â âr â, n…®‚Äëbhwaheene kokora Amaz âmu, kisha amabh…®? Urusik â ruyo tohorye, kisha twit…®?‚Äù
LUK 6:10 Y…®…®su akarora abhaat â bhayo bh â âsi, ak âmara akabh â âr…®ra  âm â ât â wuyo, ‚ÄúGorora okobhoko kwaz â.‚Äù Akakogorora, rogendo r âmw…® k âkahora!
LUK 6:11 Abhaat â bhayo, bhakiigatana bh âk âng ºu, bhakatanga kwibhisirya ch…®mbu bharaakorere Y…®…®su amabh…®.
LUK 6:12 Rusik â r âmw…®, Y…®…®su akaja k âk…®g âr â k âsabha, akatengeeza arasabha Mungu.
LUK 6:13 Tabh â âri waho, akabhabh…®r…®k…®ra abh…®…®ga bhaaz…®, gat…® waabh â akarobhora ikumi na bhabh…®r…®, akabhaha iriina rya abhatumwa. Na abhatumwa bhayo, nebho bhan â:
LUK 6:14 Sim â âni, w ân â Y…®…®su aah…®…®r…® iriina rya Peetero, Andureya umwabh â Sim â âni, Yaakobho, Yoohana, Firip â, Bhatoromayo,
LUK 6:15 Mataayo, Tomaaso, Yaakobho umwana wa Arifaay â, Sim â âni w ân â akubhirikirwa …Ñm âz…®r â âti,
LUK 6:16 Yuuda umwana wa Yaakobho, na Yuuda Isikariy â âti, w ân â iichurir…® Y…®…®su.
LUK 6:17 Y…®…®su akiika k âk…®g âr â, hamw…®mw…® nabh â, akiim…®…®r…®ra m âtandaari. Hayo, bhakiibhiringa abh…®…®ga bhaaz…® na riribhita rya abhaat â abhand…® bhan â bharuur…® muchar â ch âsi cha Yudeya, m âr âbh…®ri rwa Y…®rusar…®…®mu, na kukihuuk â cha Tiiro na Sid â âni. Abhaat â bhayo, bhakaaza kwitegeerera Y…®…®su na k âh âribhwa amarw…®r…® gaabh â.
LUK 6:18 Na bhan â bhaar…® bhak ânyaakibhwa na amasambwa, bhakah âribhwa.
LUK 6:19 Abhaat â bh â âsi, Bhakeenda kukun ºyaku Y…®…®su, k â k âbha zinguru zaar…® z…®ram âh âr âka na z…®rabhahorya bh â âsi.
LUK 6:20 Y…®…®su akabharora abh…®…®ga bhaaz…®, akabhabh â âr…®ra, ‚ÄúHak…®r…®ku imw…® abhahabh…®, k â k âbha  âbh ât…®mi bhwa Mungu ubhwanyu.
LUK 6:21 Hak…®r…®ku bhan â mukwigwa …®nzara nangw…®n â, k â k âbha m âraaza kwigutibhwa. Hak…®r…®ku bhan â m âk âr…®ra nangw…®n â, k â k âbha m âraaza koseka.
LUK 6:22 Hak…®r…®ku imw…® han â abhaat â bhak âbhabhiihirirwa, bhak âbhaah âra, bhak âbhat âka na k âbhagamb…®ra imw…® amabh…® ig âr â wu Umwana w â …Ñm â ât â.
LUK 6:23 ‚ÄúGayo garaabhabhone, mozomerwe na kubhina bh âk âng ºu, k â k âbha  âm âbhan â gwanyu n…®‚Äëm âk âr â mwisaar â. N…®mbu bhaw…®s…®…®k âr â, bhaar…® bhak ânyaacha abhar â ât…®r…®ri.
LUK 6:24 Nawe horeera imw…® abhaniibhi, k â k âbha obhozomerwa bhwanyu, m âmarir…® kobhobhona.
LUK 6:25 Horeera imw…® bhan â mukwig âta nangw…®n â, k â k âbha m âraaza kwigwa …®nzara. Horeera imw…® bhan â mokoseka kwa bhozomerwa nangw…®n â, k â k âbha m ârar…®ra na kwarama bh âk âng ºu.
LUK 6:26 Horeera imw…®, han â abhaat â bh â âsi bhak âbhakumya, k â k âbha, bhaw…®s…®…®k âr â n…®mbu bhaar…® bhak âbhakorera abhar â ât…®r…®ri bh â  âr âr…®m…®.
LUK 6:27 ‚ÄúNawe n…®rabhabh â âr…®ra imw…® bhan â mukunyiitegeerera, m âbhas…®…®g…® abhabhisa bhaanyu, na bhan â bhak âbhabhiihirirwa, m âbhakorere amaz âmu.
LUK 6:28 M âbhah…®  âr âbhang â, bhan â bhakubhiihiima, na k âbhasabh…®ra amaz âmu kwa Mungu bhan â bhak âbhakorera amabh…®.
LUK 6:29 ‚Äú…Ñm â ât â araak âbhaat âr…®  âr âsa rwu ubhury â, much âr…®r…® n â  âr ând…®. Na w ân â araakuruush…® …®kabhuuti yaaz â, umutig…®r…® n…® …®shadi.
LUK 6:30 W âw â âsi w ân â araak âsabh…® ekegero, mohe, n â  âm â ât â araakogegere bhegero bhyaz â,  âtam âsabha ak âgarukiry…®.
LUK 6:31 Mokorere abhand…® gan â mukwenda mokorerwe.
LUK 6:32 ‚ÄúNang â, m âraabhas…®…®g…® bhan â bhabhas…®…®gir…® abheene, m ârabhona bhwerak…®? Naabha bh â  âbh âbh…®, bhabhas…®…®gir…® abhaat â bhan â bhabhas…®…®gir…®!
LUK 6:33 Naatu, m âraasakiry…® bhan â bhak âbhasakirya abheene, m ârabhona bhwerak…®? Naabha bh â  âbh âbh…® bhahaakora …®bhu…®bhu!
LUK 6:34 Na m âraabhakopeshe bhan â mukwisega k âbha bharabhagarukirya, m ârabhona bhwerak…®? Naabha bh â  âbh âbh…®, bhahaabhakopesha abhak…®ndichabh â, korereke bhaaz…® bhabhagarukiry…® bhy âsi!
LUK 6:35 ‚ÄúNawe imw…®, m âbhas…®…®g…® abhabhisa bhaanyu, m âbhakorere amaz âmu. M âbhakopeshe …®tabha kwa kwisega bharabhagarukirya, neho m âraabhone  âm âbhan â  âm âk âr â. Hayo neho m âraabh…® abhaana bha Mungu wi Ig âr â wa Bhy âsi, k â k âbha, ewe ahaabhasakirya bhan â bhatakubhuga, ‚Äò…Ñz âmiry…®,‚Äô na abhak âri bha amabh…®.
LUK 6:36 M âbh…® bh…® …®bh…®g ângi k âbhaat â, ch…®mbu Wuus â ak âbharorera rig ângi.
LUK 6:37 ‚ÄúM âtat…®n…®ra abhand…®, na niimw…® m âtaaza kutinirwa na Mungu. M âtatema amasoro, na niimw…® m âtakotemwa amasoro. M âbhabheerere bhan â bhak âbhasariirya, na niimw…® m ârabheererwa.
LUK 6:38 M âbhah…® abhaat â ebhegero na niimw…® m ârahaabhwa na Mungu. M ârahaabhwa ekerengo k…®n â chizwir…® zabhi, kichimirw…® na kusingiswa kiriit…®k…®ra. Ekerengo k…®n â mokorengera abhand…® necho na niimw…® m âraarengerwe na Mungu.‚Äù
LUK 6:39 Akabhabh â âr…®ra kobherenjo, ‚ÄúHeene,  âm âh âku arat âra k âkangata  âm âh âku  âm âk…®ndichaz…®? Bh â âsi bhabh…®r…® bharagwa mwir â âma!
LUK 6:40 Umw…®ga atak âk…®ra umwija waaz…®. Nawe, araamar…® k âragirirwa na kw…®r…®kibhwa g â âsi, ahaabha nchu umwija waaz…®.
LUK 6:41 ‚ÄúNdora  ârarora ekebhereera k…®n â kiri muriis â ry â  âm âk…®ndichaz â, nawe  âtakorora …®k…®t…®n…®ka k…®n â kiri muriis â ryaz â?
LUK 6:42 Kisha  ârat ârabhw…® k âbh â âr…®ra  âm âk…®ndichaz â, ‚ÄòTiga nikuruush…® ekebhereera muriis â ryaz â,‚Äô nawe  âtakorora …®k…®t…®n…®ka muriis â ryaz â? …Ñm âbh…®…®hi aw…®! Ruusha hinga …®k…®t…®n…®ka muriis â ryaz â. Neho  âk ât âra korora bhwaheene na kuruusha ekebhereera muriis â ry â  âm âk…®ndichaz â.
LUK 6:43 ‚ÄúG âtareeho  âm ât…®  âm âz âmu g ân â gwahiibh âra imisum â …®m…®bh…®, n â  âm ât…®  âm âbh…®, g ân â gukwibh âra imisum â …®m…®z âmu.
LUK 6:44 Abhaat â bhatakutwa imisum â ju umutiini k âm…®t…® ja amahwa, na bhatakutwa imisum â j…® …®m…®zabhiibhu k âm…®t…® je emesonkoma. Nawe k âm…®t…® j âsi, g…®ramenyekana kumisum â jaku.
LUK 6:45 ∆óbhu…®bhu  âm â ât â  âm âz âmu, ahaamenyekana k âmang ºana amaz âmu, gan â gari mumw ây â gwaz…®. Nawe  âm â ât â  âm âbh…® muyomuyo, ahaagamba amang ºana amabh…®, gan â gari mumw ây â gwaz…®. Amang ºana gan â  âm â ât â ak âgamba, gararwa m âgan â gizwir…® mumw ây â gwaz…®.
LUK 6:46 ‚ÄúKwak…® m âramb…®r…®k…®ra, ‚Äò…Ñm âk âr â, …Ñm âk âr â,‚Äô nawe m âtakokora amang ºana gaan…®?
LUK 6:47 N…®rabhabh â âr…®ra ekerenjo ch â  âm â ât â w ân â akwigwa amang ºana gaan…® na k âgakora.
LUK 6:48 Wuyo, atuubh…®…®n…® nu umw âmbaki wi inyumba, w ân â aatukir…® rir â âma akahooza ritar…®, ak â âmbaka  âbh âr âsa. Mumbura, …®k…®taar â kikiiz âra, amanzi gakatema inyumba yiyo, nawe gatayisingishiry…®, k â k âbha yaar…® y âmbakirw…® bhwaheene.
LUK 6:49 Nawe, w âw â âsi w ân â akwigwa amang ºana gaan…® na atak âgakora, wuyo, atuubh…®…®n…® n â  âm â ât â w ân â  âmbakir…® inyumba yaaz…® komosekeenya, na atat…®…®r…® amabhw…® iyaas…® hinga. Ribhaga ryi imbura amanzi gakahera, gakatema inyumba yiyo. Rogendo r âmw…® …®kagwa haas…®, …®karika y â âsi.‚Äù
LUK 7:1 Han â Y…®…®su aamarir…® k âbh â âr…®ra abhaat â amang ºana gayo g â âsi, akasik…®ra m âr âbh…®ri rwa Kap…®rinaumu.
LUK 7:2 M âr âbh…®ri ruyo, aareho  âm âk âr â wa abhasirikar…® bhi Ikiruumi. …Ñm âk âr â wuyo, aar…® na mb â âsa w ân â aar…® am âs…®…®gir…® bh âk âng ºu. Nawe mb â âsa wuyo aar…® murw…®r…®, haguh…® kutin ºya.
LUK 7:3 Nang â,  âm âk âr â wuyo, aaza kwigwa …®ng ºana ig âr â wa Y…®…®su, akat âma abhakaruka abhand…® bha Abhayaahudi kwa Y…®…®su, bham âsabh…® aaz…® komohorya mb â âsa waaz…®.
LUK 7:4 Abhakaruka bhayo, bhaaza kuhika kwa Y…®…®su, bhakamwisasaama bh âk âng ºu, bharabhuga, ‚Äú…Ñm â ât â wuyo, areenderwa omokorere ring ºana y…®n â,
LUK 7:5 k â k âbha as…®…®gir…® ichar â ch…®t â, na newe atw âmbakiir…® rirwaz…®r â.‚Äù
LUK 7:6 Neho Y…®…®su akarweho hamw…®mw…® na abhakaruka bhayo, kuja y…®…®ka w â  âm âk âr â wuyo. Na han â bhaahiis…®m…®…®r…®,  âm âk âr â wuyo akat âma abhasaani bhaaz…®. Bhakahira amang ºana gaaz…® kwa Y…®…®su, bhakam âbh â âr…®ra, ‚Äú…Ñm âk âr â, utiinyaacha bh âk âng ºu, k â k âbha …®takwenderwa usik…®r…® …®waan…®.
LUK 7:7 Necho naar…® niriirora n…®takwenderwa kuuza kwa naaw…®. Nawe, gamba ing ºana r…®mw…®bhu, omohocha waan…® arahora.
LUK 7:8 ‚ÄúN…®rabhugabhu k â k âbha, iny â âsi niri iyaas…® w â  âbh ânaja bhwa abhand…®, na n…®na abhasirikar…® bhan â bhari iyaas…® waan…®. N…®raabh â âr…®r…® w âmw…®, ‚ÄòNuuj…®,‚Äô ahaaja. N…®raabh â âr…®r…®  âw ând…®, ‚ÄòNauz…®,‚Äô ahaaza. Na n…®raabh â âr…®r…® mb â âsa waan…®, ‚ÄòKora omoremo g ân â,‚Äô ahaakora.‚Äù
LUK 7:9 Han â Y…®…®su iigwir…® gayo, akar âg â âra bh âk âng ºu. Akiich âr…®ra riribhita rya abhaat â, bhan â bhaar…® bharamutuna, akabhuga, ‚ÄúN…®rabhabh â âr…®ra, n â âr â gat…® wa Abhiizira…®ri bh â âsi, n…®k…®…®r…® korora  âm â ât â w âw â âsi wu ubhwisirirya  âbh âk âr â ncha bh ân â!‚Äù
LUK 7:10 Na abhaat â bhan â bhaatumirw…® bhakagar âka munyumba y â  âm âk âr â wuyo, bhakabhona mb â âsa amarir…® kohora.
LUK 7:11 Ak âmara, Y…®…®su akaja m âr âbh…®ri rwa Naini, na abh…®…®ga bhaaz…® na abhaat â abhand…® bhaaru, bhakamutuna.
LUK 7:12 Na han â iis…®m…®…®r…® ikishoko ch â  âr âbh…®ri, akarumana na abhaat â, bhan â bhaar…® bhag…®gir…® …®k…®t ând â chu umumura, bharah âr âka ig ât â w â  âr âbh…®ri. Umumura wuyo, aar…® umwana umumw…®mw…®, na unina aar…® umukwirwa. Unina wuyo, akahirana na abhaat â bhaaru bh â  âr âbh…®ri ruyo.
LUK 7:13 Han â …Ñm âk âr â aar â âz…® umukwirwa wuyo, akamororera …®bh…®g ângi, akam âbh â âr…®ra, ‚Äú…Ñtar…®ra.‚Äù
LUK 7:14 Akiisuka k âk…®rag â k…®n â …®k…®t ând â char…®, akakikun ºya. Na abhaat â bhan â bhaak…®g…®gir…®, bhakiim…®…®r…®ra. Y…®…®su akabhuga, ‚ÄúMura, n…®rak âbh â âr…®ra, bh â âka!‚Äù
LUK 7:15 Umumura w ân â aar…® akuur…®, rogendo r âmw…® akabh â âka, akiikara, akatanga k âgamba. Neho Y…®…®su akamugwatya unina.
LUK 7:16 Abhaat â bhayo bh â âsi, bhakagwatwa nu ubhw âbha, bhakatanga kukumya Mungu, bharabhuga, ‚Äú…Ñm âr â ât…®r…®ri  âm âk âr â, ahurukiir…® gat…® w…®…®t â!‚Äù Na, ‚ÄúMungu, iizir…® k âsakirya abhaat â bhaaz…®!‚Äù
LUK 7:17 Amang ºana gayo, gakanyaragana bh âk âng ºu Yudeya y â âsi, na muchar â …®k…®nd…® cha m âr âbh…®ri.
LUK 7:18 Han â Y…®…®su aar…® arakora g â âsi gayo, Yoohana akareeterwa …®ng ºana ya Y…®…®su na abh…®…®ga bhaaz…®.
LUK 7:19 Yoohana akabhabh…®r…®k…®ra abh…®…®ga bhabh…®r…®, akabhat âma bhaj…® kubhuurya …Ñm âk âr â, ‚ÄúAw…® naaw…® Kiriisit â w ân â akuuza, kisha t âr…®nd…®  âw ând…®?‚Äù
LUK 7:20 Bhaaza kuhika bhakam âbh â âr…®ra, ‚ÄúYoohana …Ñm âbhatiizi atutumir…® kwa nawe, tukubhuury…®, ‚ÄòAw…® naaw…® Kiriisit â w ân â akuuza, kisha t âr…®nd…®  âw ând…®?‚Äô‚Ää‚Äù
LUK 7:21 Kwibhaga riyoriyo, Y…®…®su aar…® arahorya abhaat â bhaaru amarw…®r…® gaabh â. Aar…® arasakirya bhan â bhak ânyaakibhwa na amasambwa na abhah âku bhaaru bhat âr…® korora.
LUK 7:22 Neho Y…®…®su akabhagarukirya, ‚ÄúMuj…® m âbh â âr…®r…® Yoohana g â âsi gan â m âr â âz…®, na g â âsi gan â mwigwir…®. Abhah âku bhararora, abharema bharagenda, abhagenge bharahora, abharibhi bha amatw…® bhariigwa, abhaku bharary âka, na abhahabh…® bhararwazirwa ∆óng ºana ∆ónz âmu.
LUK 7:23 Hak…®r…®ku  âm â ât â w ân â ataana mak…®bhw…® ig âr â waan…®.‚Äù
LUK 7:24 Han â bhabh…®r…® bhayo bhaagiir…®, Y…®…®su akatanga k âgamba na riribhita rya abhaat â ig âr â wa Yoohana, ‚ÄúM âkaja mwit…®r…®g â kororak…®? Korora  âm â ât â w ân â akwisirirya amang ºana g â âsi ncha rik âr…® r…®n â r…®haasingishwa n â  âm âkama?
LUK 7:25 M âkaja kororak…®? M âkaja korora  âm â ât â w ân â iibh âhir…® zengebho z…®nz âmu za riguri? Z…®yi! Abhaat â bhan â bhahiibhoha amiibhoho amaz âmu bh âk âng ºu nu ukwizomya ig âr â wu ubhuniibhi bhwe ebhegero bh…®n â bhaanabhy â, bhahiikara muzinyumba za abhat…®mi!
LUK 7:26 Nawe m âkaja kororak…®? …Ñm âr â ât…®r…®ri? Hee, n…®rabhabh â âr…®ra, Yoohana n…®‚Äëm âk âr â k âk…®ra  âm âr â ât…®r…®ri.
LUK 7:27 Wuyo newe w ân â Amaand…®k â Amar…®ndu gaagambir…® ig âr â waaz…®, ‚ÄòRora, n…®rat âma umutumwa waan…® m âbh âtang…® bhwaz â, w ân â araakokonzere …®nz…®ra.‚Äô‚Ää‚Äù
LUK 7:28 Y…®…®su akabhuga naatu, ‚ÄúN…®rabhabh â âr…®ra, m âbhaat â bh â âsi bhan â bhiibhwir…® k â âs…®, atareeho  âm âk âr â k âk…®ra Yoohana. Nawe,  âm â ât â umusuuhu k âk…®ra bh â âsi m âbh ât…®mi bhwa Mungu, newe  âm âk âr â k âk…®ra Yoohana.‚Äù
LUK 7:29 Abhaat â bh â âsi, hamw…®mw…® na abharihya bha rig â âti, han â bhiigwir…® amang ºana ga Y…®…®su gayo, bhakiisirirya k âbha …®s…®…®mi ya Mungu yaar…® nz âmu, k â k âbha abhaat â bhayo nebho bharya Yoohana amarir…® k âbhatiiza.
LUK 7:30 Nawe, Abhafarisaayo na abhiija bhi imigir â bhataabhatiizirw…® na Yoohana, k â k âbha bhakaanga amiis…®…®gi ga Mungu.

LUK 7:32 Bhatuubh…®…®n…® na abhaana bhan â bhiik…®…®r…® momoteera, bhakwibh…®r…®k…®ra abheene kobheene bharabhuga, ‚ÄòT âkabhatemera ekereere, nawe m âtaabhinir…®! T âk…®…®mba am…®…®mb â gu ukwarama, nawe m âtaaririr…®!‚Äô

LUK 8:1 Ak âmara, Y…®…®su akah…®ta mumij…® na m âz…®mb…®ri, ararwaz…®ra abhaat â ∆óng ºana ∆ónz âmu y â  âbh ât…®mi bhwa Mungu. Abh…®…®ga bhaaz…® ikumi na bhabh…®r…®,
LUK 8:2 bh âmb…® na abhakari bhan â abhah âriry…® amarw…®r…®, na k âbharuusha amasambwa, bhakahirana nawe. Gat…® wa abhakari bhayo aareho Mariyamu wa Magidarena, w ân â Y…®…®su amuruushiry…® amasambwa muhungat…®.

LUK 8:5 ‚ÄúKwar…® nu umubhusuri w âmw…®. Rusik â r âmw…® akaja kubhusura zimbusur â zaaz…® m âm âg ând â. Han â aar…® akubhusura zimbusur â ziyo, …®z…®nd…® z…®kagwa k ânz…®ra, z…®katazwatazwa, ni ibhinyunyi bh…®kaaza bh…®kazirya.

LUK 8:39 ‚ÄúGar âka …®waanyu,  âbh â âr…®r…® abhaat â amang ºana gan â Mungu ak âk âr…®…®r…®.‚Äù Neho  âm â ât â wuyo akarwa hayo, akaja, akabha ararwaz…®ra abhaat â ahagero h â âsi m âr âbh…®ri amang ºana amaz âmu gan â Y…®…®su aam âk âr…®…®r…®.

LUK 8:41 Neho akaaza  âm â ât â w âmw…®, arabhirikirwa Yair â,  âm âk âr â wa rirwaz…®r â. Akahigama m âbh âtang…® bhwa Y…®…®su, akamwisasaama aj…® y…®…®ka waaz…®,
LUK 8:42 k â k âbha umuucha waaz…® umumw…®mw…®, w ân â aar…® ni imyaka ikumi n…® …®bh…®r…®, aar…® haguh…® kukwa. Han â Y…®…®su aar…® akuja, riribhita rya bhaat â r…®kabha r…®ramurimbya mbaara z â âsi.

LUK 9:62 Y…®…®su akam âbh â âr…®ra, ‚Äú…Ñm â ât â w ân â atangir…® k âr…®ma, …®n â ariich âra na korora inyuma, wuyo atakwenderwa k âbha omohocha wa Mungu m âbh ât…®mi bhwaz…®.‚Äù
LUK 10:1 Mmbe, ak âmara …Ñm âk âr â Y…®…®su akarobhora abh…®…®ga abhand…® merongo muhungat…® na bhabh…®r…®. Akabhat âma bhabh…®r…® bhabh…®r…®, bham âkangat…®r…® kuja z…®mb…®ri z â âsi na ahagero h â âsi, han â …®…®ndir…® kuhika umwene.
LUK 10:2 Y…®…®su akabhabh â âr…®ra, ‚ÄúAmagesa maaru, nawe abhahocha, n…®‚Äëbhasuuhu. Mmbe m âsabh…® Mungu newe umwene m âg ând â, korereke at âm…® abhahocha m âm âg ând â gwaz…®, bhagese.

LUK 11:28 Y…®…®su akabhuga, ‚ÄúNawe hak…®r…®ku bh âk âng ºu bhan â bhakwigwa …®ng ºana ya Mungu na k ây…®s â âka!‚Äù

LUK 14:24 Nawe n…®rabhabh â âr…®ra, bhan â bh â âsi nabharaarikir…®, atareeho n â âr â w âmw…® waabh â, w ân â araasam…® …®nyangi yaan…®!‚Äô‚Ää‚Äù
LUK 14:25 Y…®…®su aar…® arahirana na amaribhita ga abhaat â. Akabhiich âr…®ra, akabhabh â âr…®ra,
LUK 14:26 ‚Äú…Ñm â ât â w âw â âsi araaz…® kwa niiny…®, atak ât âra k âbha umw…®ga waan…®, ar…®…®bh…® ak…®…®r…® k âns…®…®ga k âk…®ra wiis…®, unina,  âm âkari waaz…®, abhaana bhaaz…®, abhahiiri bhaaz…®, na abhasubhaati bhaaz…®, n â âr â ewe umwene.
LUK 14:27 N â  âm â ât â w âw â âsi w ân â ak…®…®r…® kogega  âm âsarabha gwaz…® antun…®, atak ât âra k âbha umw…®ga waan…®.
LUK 14:28 ‚ÄúW âmw…® waanyu areende kw âmbaka inyumba y…® …®k…®k âng â. Ni w…®…®w…® atakwikara hinga haas…® na kwiseega riguri rye ebhegero bh…®n â araahokerye kury âmbaka, at âr…® korora ar…®…®bh…® ana zimpirya zu ukwisa k âmara kw âmbaka?
LUK 14:29 Araatam…® kokorabhu, arat âra kw âmbaka  âbh âr âsa, nawe atamw…® k ây…®mariirya. Han â abhaat â bharaarore bharamorega,
LUK 14:30 bharabhuga, ‚Äò…Ñm â ât â w ân â akatanga iry âmbaka, nawe atamirw…® k âmariirya inyumba!‚Äô
LUK 14:31 ‚ÄúNihuruch…® ekerenjo …®k…®nd…®. Abhat…®mi bhabh…®r…® bhakeenda kuja mwih…®. We embere ana abhasirikar…® bh…®kw…® ikumi,  âw ând…® bh…®kw…® merongo …®bh…®r…®. LUK 14:32 Araarore k âbha aratamwa, rogendo r âmw…® arabhat âma abhahocha bhaaz…®, bhaj…® bhwang â k âm ât…®mi  âw ând…® ak…®…®r…® kore, bhiigwan…®.
LUK 14:33 ‚ÄúMuyomuyo na niimw…®, atareeho w âmw…® waanyu arat âra k âbha umw…®ga waan…®, ar…®…®bh…® ak…®…®r…® kutiga bhy âsi bh…®n â anabhy â.
LUK 14:34 ‚Äú…Ñm â âny â, ne‚Äëkegero k…®z âmu, nawe guriibhury…®  âbh âsambaruku bhwagw…®, g âratuurirwa k…®g âr âk…® korereke gozome naatu?
LUK 14:35 …Ñm â âny â gwe eteemwa y…®n â, g âtakwenderwa mokegero, mobhototo, naabha komboreeya, abhaat â bharagorekera. W â  âk âtw…®, iitegeerere.‚Äù
LUK 15:1 Rusik â r âmw…®, abharihya bha rig â âti na bh â  âbh âbh…®, bhaar…® bhariisuk…®ra Y…®…®su, bhamwitegeerere.
LUK 15:2 ∆ókagirya Abhafarisaayo na abhiija bhi imigir â, bhakiibheerya bharabhuga, ‚Äú…Ñm â ât â w ân â, ndora arabhaginihya bh â  âbh âbh…®! Naatu ararya nabh â!‚Äù
LUK 15:3 Neho Y…®…®su akabhaha ekerenjo, akabhuga,
LUK 15:4 ‚ÄúAw…®…®, w âmw…® waanyu ana z…®ng º ându igana r…®mw…®. Araang ºur…® …®y…®mw…® yaho ibhurir…®, arakorabhw…®? Atakuzitiga merongo kenda na kenda mukiriish â, na kuja komohya y…®n â ibhurir…®, kuhika ayebhone?
LUK 15:5 Han â araayebhone, arayegega k âmabhega kwa bhozomerwa.

LUK 15:7 ‚ÄúN…®rabhabh â âr…®ra, muyo n…®mbu k âraabh…® no obhozomerwa bhwaru mwisaar â, han â  âm âk âri w â  âbh âbh…® w âmw…® araatig…®  âbh âbh…® bhwaz…®. Obhozomerwa bhuyo bh ârabha bh âk âr â k âk…®ra bhwa abhaat â abhaz âmu merongo kenda na kenda bhan â bhataana ebhoono yu ukwich âra.

LUK 15:11 Y…®…®su akang ºeha k âgamba, ‚ÄúKwar…® n â  âm â ât â w âmw…®, aar…® na abhaana bhabh…®r…® bhi ikisubh…®.

LUK 16:10 ‚Äú…Ñm â ât â omoronge k âmang ºana amasuuhu, newe omoronge n â âr â k âmak âr â. ∆óbhu n…®mbu,  âm â ât â wa amang º…®…®ni k âmang ºana amasuuhu, newe  âm âng º…®…®ni n â âr â k âmak âr â.
LUK 16:11 Ar…®…®bh…®  âtabh…®…®r…® moronge kohokerya ebhegero bhy…® …®…®s…® y…®n â, …®tak ât âr…®kana  âhaabhw…® ebhegero bhya amaheene mwisaar â!
LUK 16:12 Ar…®…®bh…® m âtabh…®…®r…® bharonge k â k âbh…®…®ka ebhegero bhy â  âw ând…®, …®tak ât âr…®kana m âhaabhw…® ebhegero bhyanyu imubheene!
LUK 16:13 ‚ÄúAtareeho  âm â ât â w ân â ak ât âra kohokerya abhak âr â bhabh…®r…®, k â k âbha arat âra kubhiihirirwa  âw âmw…® na k âs…®…®ga  âw ând…®, hamw…® kugwatana n â  âw âmw…® na korega  âw ând…®. Na niimw…®, m âtak ât âra kohokerya Mungu ne ebhegero hamw…®mw…®!‚Äù
LUK 16:14 Han â Abhafarisaayo bhiigwir…® amang ºana gayo ga Y…®…®su, bhakatanga komoseka kwa kerege, k â k âbha bhakas…®…®ga bh âk âng ºu zimpirya.
LUK 16:15 Y…®…®su akabhabh â âr…®ra, ‚ÄúImw…®, muriikorya m âbh âtang…® bhwa abhaat â k âbha mone eheene. Nawe, Mungu am…®nyir…® amang ºana gan â gar…® mozekoro zaanyu. Amang ºana gan â abhaat â bhahaas…®…®ga bh âk âng ºu, gariigatan ºya Mungu!
LUK 16:16 ‚ÄúImigir â ja Musa, na amaand…®k â ga abhar â ât…®r…®ri, gaar…® garatunwa na abhaat â kuhika ribhaga rya Yoohana. Kw…®ma ribhaga riyo, ∆óng ºana ∆ónz âmu y â  âbh ât…®mi bhwa Mungu …®kabha …®ragambwa, na abhaat â bh â âsi bhahiisikirya kwa nguru.
LUK 16:17 Nawe n…®‚Äëk âny â âhu bh âk âng ºu kwa risaar â ni ichar â kurweho, k âk…®ra kaand…®k â kasuuhu ki imigir â kuhutwa.
LUK 16:18 ‚ÄúUmusubh…®, w ân â akutiga m âkaaz…® nu ukukw…®ra  âw ând…®, arasebheeta. Nu umusubh…® araakw…®r…®  âm âkari w ân â ah…®…®bhirw…® nu umusubh…® waaz…®, arasebheeta.
LUK 16:19 ‚ÄúKwar…® nu umuniibhi w âmw…®, w ân â aar…® akokora …®nyangi k…®rakabhu na kwibhoha amiibhoho amaz âmu ga zambaraaw…® gi guri ik âr â.
LUK 16:20 Na mukisik â chu umuniibhi wuyo, haareho n â  âm âhabh…® w âmw…®, iriina ryaz…® Razaar â. Razaar â wuyo,  âm âbh…®r…® gwaz…® gw âsi gwar…® gwizwir…® ebhedonda,
LUK 16:21 na zimbwa zaar…® z…®raaza komeesa ebhedonda bhyaz…®. Han â amasaaj â gaar…® gakugwa kurwa kwigari, Razaar â akabha ariigomba ahaabhw…®, k â k âbha aar…® ariigwa …®nzara.
LUK 16:22 ‚ÄúMmbe  âm âhabh…® Razaar â akakwa. Maraika akamuhira haguh…® na Abhurahaamu. Umuniibhi w â âsi akakwa, akabhiikwa.
LUK 16:23 Han â umuniibhi aar…® aranyaaka bh âk âng ºu nyaari, akan ânga am…®…®s â, akarora Abhurahaamu kwa kore na Razaar â haguh…® nawe.
LUK 16:24 Akam âbh…®r…®k…®ra kwiraka, ‚ÄòBhaabha Abhurahaamu, ondorere …®bh…®g ângi! N…®ranyaaka momorero g ân â! M ât âm…® Razaar â aaz…® kwa niiny…®, akorye esonga yi ichara m âmanzi, atoonye k âr âr…®m…® rwan…® korereke ruzir…®r…®.‚Äô
LUK 16:25 ‚ÄúNawe, Abhurahaamu akam âgarukirya, ‚ÄòMwana waan…®, uhiit…® k âbha  âkabhona amang ºana amaz âmu mubhwikari bhwaz â, na Razaar â, akabhona amabh…®. Nawe nang â, ewe arabhona amaz âmu, na naaw…®  âranyaaka.
LUK 16:26 Hamw…®mw…® na gayo, gat…® w…®…®t â na niimw…®, k ât…®…®rw…®h â rir â âma ik âr â bh âk âng ºu, korereke bhan â bhakwenda kurwa …®n â kuuza kwa niimw…®, bhatanaja kwamb âka, na bhan â bhakwenda kurwa iyo kuuza kwa niitw…®, bhatanaja.‚Äô
LUK 16:27 ‚ÄúNeho umuniibhi akabhuga, ‚ÄòNang â bhaabha, n…®rak âsabha  ât âm…® Razaar â aj…® y…®…®ka kwa bhaabha,
LUK 16:28 abhareche abhahiiri bhaan…® bhataan â, bhataaza kuuza …®n â ahagero h…® …®nyaak â bh âk âng ºu.‚Äô
LUK 16:29 ‚ÄúNawe, Abhurahaamu akam âgarukirya, ‚ÄòAbhahiiri bhaaz â, bhaana Musa na abhar â ât…®r…®ri, bhabhiitegeerere bhayo!‚Äô
LUK 16:30 ‚ÄúUmuniibhi akam âgarukirya, ‚ÄòZ…®yi, bhaabha Abhurahaamu! Nawe,  âm â ât â araaj…® kwebho kurwa m âbhaku, bharatiga  âbh âbh…® bhwabh â.‚Äô
LUK 16:31 ‚ÄúAbhurahaamu akam âgarukirya, ‚ÄòAbhahiiri bhaaz â bhayo, bhar…®…®tam…® kwitegeerera Musa na abhar â ât…®r…®ri, bhatak âd…®…®r…®…®ra n â âr â  âm â ât â ariiry âk…® kurwa m âbhaku.‚Äô‚Ää‚Äù
LUK 17:1 Y…®…®su akabhabh â âr…®ra abh…®…®ga bhaaz…®, ‚ÄúIbhitimotimo bh…®n â bh…®ragirya abhaat â bhakore  âbh âbh…®, bh…®rabhaho kemerano. Nawe, horeera k âm â ât â w ân â araagiry…® ibhitimotimo bhiyo!
LUK 17:2 Yangabh…®…®r…® hak…®r…®ku kwewe abhoherwe  âr âbhw…® mwig âti, na arekerwe m ânyanza, k âk…®ra k âhabhya w âmw…® wa abhasuuhu akore  âbh âbh…®.
LUK 17:3 K âgayo, mwiyangar…®r…® m âtaaza kokorabhu! ‚ÄúAr…®…®bh…® umuhiiri waaz â araak âsariiry…®, omoreche, na araatig…®  âbh âbh…® bhwaz…®, omobheerere.
LUK 17:4 N â âr â araak âsariiry…® manga muhungat…® kurusik â r âmw…®, na manga z â âsi araaza k âk âsabha arabhuga, ‚ÄòNitigir…®  âbh âbh…®, mbeerera,‚Äô mobheerere!‚Äù
LUK 17:5 Neho abhatumwa bhayo bhakabh â âr…®ra …Ñm âk âr â, ‚ÄúUtwongereere ubhwisirirya bhw…®t â.‚Äù
LUK 17:6 …Ñm âk âr â akabhagarukirya, ‚ÄúAngabh…®…®r…® mwar…® nu ubhwisirirya nche ekerengo che endetere isuuhu y…® …®haradaari, mwar…® m ârabh â âr…®ra omoko g ân â, ‚ÄòIh…®ka uj…® omere m ânyanza,‚Äô gw âsi gwar…® g ârabhiigwa.

LUK 17:8 Z…®yi! Aram âbh â âr…®ra, ‚ÄòNtengera ibhyakurya, ong ºehe k ânyangar…®ra kuhika han â n…®raamar…® kurya na kunywa. Neho aw â âsi ury…® na kunywa.‚Äô
LUK 17:9 Nang â! Mb â âsa araakore ch…®mbu  âm âk âr â waaz…® aamuswajiry…®,  âm âk âr â wuyo aramukumya k âk âgakora? Z…®yi!

LUK 18:43 Rogendo r âmw…®, akarora, akatuna Y…®…®su, arakumya Mungu. Han â abhaat â bh â âsi bhaar â âz…® gayo, bhakatanga kukumya Mungu.

JOH 3:33 …Ñm â ât â w âw â âsi w ân â akwisirirya  âbh âm…®ny…®…®k…®r…®ri bhwaz…®, areerekeererya k âbha Mungu n…®‚Äëwa amaheene,

JOH 8:11 Akam âgarukirya, ‚Äú…Ñm âk âr â, atareeho n â âr â w âmw…®.‚Äù Y…®…®su akam âbh â âr…®ra, ‚ÄúNa niiny…® n…®tak âk ât…®n…®ra. Nuuj…®, nawe k âtang…®ra reero,  âtakora  âbh âbh…® kwik…®.‚Äù]
JOH 8:12 Y…®…®su akang ºeha k âgamba, ‚ÄúIny…® niiny…® ubhw…®r â bhwi ichar â. …Ñm â ât â w âw â âsi w ân â akuntuna, atakogenda mukiirimya nangabha hasuuhu, nawe arabha nu ubhw…®r â bh ân â bh âk âm âkangata m âbh âh âru bhwa kemerano.‚Äù
JOH 8:13 Abhafarisaayo bhakabh â âr…®ra Y…®…®su, ‚ÄúAw…® uriimenyeekererya aumwene. …Ñbh âm…®ny…®…®k…®r…®ri bhwaz â bh âtar…® bhwa maheene!‚Äù
JOH 8:14 Y…®…®su akabhagarukirya, ‚ÄúN â âr â niriimenyeekererya inyimwene,  âbh âm…®ny…®…®k…®r…®ri bhwan…® n…®‚Äëbhwa amaheene. Iny…® n…®…®z…® han â niruur…®, na n…®…®z…® han â nikuja. Nawe imw…® m ât…®…®z…® han â niruur…® na han â nikuja.
JOH 8:15 Imw…® m ârant…®n…®ra k âr…®ng ºaana na amiis…®…®gi ga abhaat â, nawe iny…® n…®tak ât…®n…®ra  âm â ât â w âw â âsi.
JOH 8:16 Nawe, ar…®…®bh…® iny…® n…®rat…®n…®ra  âm â ât â, n…®ram ât…®n…®ra koheene, k â k âbha iny…® n…®tar…® inyimwene, nawe n…®r…® hamw…®mw…® na Bhaabha w ân â antumir…®.
JOH 8:17 Mumigir â janyu yandikirw…® k âbha,  âbh âm…®ny…®…®k…®r…®ri bhwa abhaat â bhabh…®r…® bhuriisegwa k âbha bhwa maheene.
JOH 8:18 Mmbe, iny…® niiny…® nikwimenyeekererya inyimwene, na Bhaabha w ân â antumir…® w â âsi araamenyeekererya.‚Äù
JOH 8:19 Neho Abhafarisaayo bhakamubhuurya, ‚ÄúNang â, Wuus â ar…® hayi?‚Äù Y…®…®su akabhagarukirya, ‚ÄúImw…® m âtaany…®z…® iny…®, n â âr â Bhaabha waan…® m âtamw…®z…®. Ar…®…®bh…® mwangam…®nyir…® iny…®, mwar…® m âramenya na Bhaabha.‚Äù
JOH 8:20 Y…®…®su akagamba gayo g â âsi, ribhaga r…®n â aar…® ariija muchumba cha zimpirya k…®n â char…® mwihekaaru. Nawe ataareho  âm â ât â w ân â aamugwatir…®, k â k âbha ribhaga ryaz…® ryar…® r…®k…®…®r…® kuhika.
JOH 8:21 Mmbe, Y…®…®su akabh â âr…®ra Abhafarisaayo bhayo naatu, ‚ÄúIny…® n…®raja, na niimw…® m âramonhya, imw…® m ârakwa ig âr â w â  âbh âbh…® bhwanyu. Han â n…®raaj…® iny…®, imw…® m âtak ât âra kuuza.‚Äù
JOH 8:22 Neho abhakangati bha Abhayaahudi bhakatanga kwibhuurya, ‚ÄúKwak…® arabhuga, t âtak ât âra kumutuna han â akuja? Araja kwiyita?‚Äù
JOH 8:23 Y…®…®su akang ºeha k âbhabh â âr…®ra, ‚ÄúImw…® muruur…® iyaas…® han â, nawe iny…® niruur…® ig âr â mwisaar â. Imw…® n…®‚Äëbha k â âs…® k ân â, nawe iny…® n…®tar…® wa k â âs…® k ân â.
JOH 8:24 Kiyo necho chagiriry…® n…®kabhabh â âr…®ra, m ârakwa ig âr â w â  âbh âbh…® bhwanyu. Mmbe, ar…®…®bh…® m âtakwisirirya k âbha ‚ÄòIny…® Niiny…®,‚Äô m ârakwa ig âr â w â  âbh âbh…® bhwanyu.‚Äù
JOH 8:25 Bh â âsi bhakamubhuurya, ‚Äú…Ñt âbh â âr…®r…®, aw…® n…®‚Äëw…®…®w…®?‚Äù Y…®…®su akabhagarukirya, ‚ÄúN…®bhabhuuriir…® kw…®ma  âbh âtang…® k âbha iny…® n…®‚Äëw…®…®w…®!
JOH 8:26 N…®na amang ºana maaru gan â nangaturir…® k âgamba ig âr â waanyu na k âbhat…®n…®ra, nawe n…®takokorabhu. Nawe w ân â antumir…® n…®‚Äëwa amaheene, na niiny…® n…®rabh â âr…®ra abhaat â amang ºana gan â niigwir…® kurwa kwewe.‚Äù
JOH 8:27 Han â bhiigwir…® gayo, bhat â âbh â ârir…® k âbha aar…® aragamba neebho ig âr â wa Wiis…® wa mwisaar â.
JOH 8:28 Mmbe, Y…®…®su akabhabh â âr…®ra, ‚ÄúHan â m âk ân ânga Umwana w â …Ñm â ât â korereke mumwit…®, hayo neho mokomenya k âbha iny…® newe. Na m âramenya k âbha g â âsi gan â nekokora, n…®takokora k âbh ânaja bhwan…®, nawe n…®ragagamba ch…®mbu Bhaabha waan…® aanyiijiry…®.
JOH 8:29 W ân â antumir…® ar…® hamw…®mw…® na niiny…®. Ak…®…®r…® kuntiga inyimwene, k â k âbha ribhaga ry âsi n…®rakora gan â gakomozomera.‚Äù
JOH 8:30 Han â Y…®…®su aar…® ak âgamba amang ºana gayo, abhaat â bhaaru bhakamwisirirya.

JOH 8:32 Na m âramenya amaheene, na amaheene gayo, garabhaha ubhwiyagaaruri.‚Äù

JOH 8:35 Mb â âsa atakwikara munyumba y â  âm âk âr â waaz…® sik â z â âsi, nawe umwana newe ak âsaaga munyumba sik â z â âsi.
JOH 8:36 Ar…®…®bh…® Umwana wa Mungu abhatazwir…® kurwa m âbh âbh…® bhwanyu, m âtak âbha bhamb â âsa naatu, nawe m ârabha abhaat â bhu ubhwiyagaaruri heeneheene.
JOH 8:37 N…®…®z…® k âbha, imw…® ni‚Äëbhiibhurwa bha Abhurahaamu. Nawe moreenda kunyita, k â k âbha m âraanga kwisirirya gan â nikubhiija.

JOH 8:44 Imw…® n…®‚Äëbha Sh…®taani, wuyo newe wuus â! Nang â moreenda kokora gan â wuus â akwigomba. Sh…®taani ni‚Äëmwiti kw…®ma  âbh âtang…®. JOH 8:59 Han â Abhayaahudi bhiigwir…® gayo, bhakatoora amabhw…® korereke bhamoteme nag â bhamwit…®. Nawe Y…®…®su akiibhisa, akarwa mwihekaaru.
JOH 9:1 Urusik â r âmw…®, han â Y…®…®su aar…® aragenda k ânz…®ra, akarora  âm â ât â w âmw…® w ân â iibhwirw…® m âh âku.
JOH 9:2 Abh…®…®ga bhaaz…® bhakamubhuurya, ‚ÄúUmwija,  âm â ât â w ân â akiibhurwa  âm âh âku k â k âbha y â  âbh âbh…® bhwa w…®…®w…®? N…®‚Äëbhw â  âm â ât â w ân â umwene, hamw…® bhwa abhiibhuri bhaaz…®?‚Äù
JOH 9:3 Y…®…®su akabhagarukirya, ‚ÄúW ân â atar…®  âm âh âku k â k âbha y â  âbh âbh…® bhwaz…®, hamw…®  âbh âbh…® bhwa abhiibhuri bhaaz…®. Nawe akiibhurwa  âm âh âku, korereke  âbh ânaja bhwa Mungu bhororekan…® k âbhaat â mubhwikari bhwaz…®.

JOH 9:5 Ribhaga r…®n â n…®k…®…®r…® k â âs…® k ân â, iny…® ni‚Äëbhw…®r â k âbhaat â bh â âsi.‚Äù
JOH 9:6 Han â Y…®…®su aamarir…® k âgamba amang ºana gayo, akatwa amat…® kobhototo, akabhanda obhototo na amat…®, akahaka k âm…®…®s â g â  âm âh âku wuyo.
JOH 9:7 Ak âmara akam âbh â âr…®ra, ‚ÄúNuuj…® wiisaabh…® ubhush â mwitabha rya Sir âamu.‚Äù Sir âamu, enzobhooro yaku n…®‚Äëw ân â atumirw…®. Neho  âm âh âku wuyo akaja, akiisaabha ubhush â, akagar âka y…®…®ka waaz…® ararora.

JOH 9:9 Abhand…® bhakabhuga, ‚ÄúNewe.‚Äù Abhand…® bhakabhuga, ‚ÄúAtar…® newe, nawe atuubh…®…®n…® neewe bh âk âng ºu.‚Äù Nawe umwene akabhabh â âr…®ra, ‚ÄúMaheene, niiny…®.‚Äù

JOH 9:15 Mmbe, Abhafarisaayo bh â âsi bhakabhuurya  âm â ât â wuyo ch…®mbu aaturir…® korora. Akabhagarukirya, ‚ÄúAkanhaka obhototo k âm…®…®s â, nikiisaabha, na nang â n…®rarora.‚Äù
JOH 9:16 Neho Abhafarisaayo abhand…® bhakabhuga, ‚Äú…Ñm â ât â w ân â aak ârir…®bhu, ataruur…® kwa Mungu, k â k âbha arasarya imigir â ju urusik â rw â  âbh ât â âr â.‚Äù Nawe abhand…® bhakabhuga, ‚ÄúNang â,  âm âk âri w â  âbh âbh…® arat ârabhw…® kokora ich…®r…®k…®n ºy â ncha kiyo?‚Äù K âgayo, bhakataaman ºya abheene kobheene.

JOH 9:18 Nawe abhakangati bha Abhayaahudi bhayo bhatiisiriiry…® k âbha,  âm â ât â w ân â akorora nangw…®n â, aar…® iibhwirw…® m âh âku. K âgayo, bhakabh…®r…®k…®ra abhiibhuri bhaaz…®.
JOH 9:19 Bhakabhabhuurya, ‚ÄúAng â,  âm â ât â w ân â ni‚Äëmwana waanyu? N…®‚Äëmaheene akiibhurwa  âm âh âku? Ar…®…®bh…® n…®mbu, arat ârabhw…® korora nang â?‚Äù
JOH 9:20 Neho abhiibhuri bhaaz…® bhakabhagarukirya, ‚ÄúItw…® t âm…®nyir…® k âbha w ân â ni‚Äëmwana w…®…®t â, na akiibhurwa m âh âku.
JOH 9:21 Nawe t ât…®…®z…® ch…®mbu aturir…® korora, na t ât…®…®z…®  âm â ât â w ân â aah âriry…® am…®…®s â gaaz…®. Mumubhuury…® umwene, k â k âbha n…®‚Äëm â ât â mugima, arat âra k âgamba umwene.‚Äù
JOH 9:22 Abhiibhuri bhaaz…® bhakabhugabhu, k â k âbha bhaar…® bhar â âbhaha abhakangati bhayo. Abhakangati bha Abhayaahudi bhayo bhaar…® bhiisirir…®…®n ºy…® k âbha,  âm â ât â w âw â âsi w ân â akwisirirya Y…®…®su newe Kiriisit â, araheebhwa kurwa m âmarwaz…®r â gaabh â.
JOH 9:23 Necho chagiriry…® abhiibhuri bhakabhuga, ‚ÄúMumubhuury…® umwene, k â k âbha n…®‚Äëm â ât â mugima.‚Äù
JOH 9:24 Mmbe, abhakangati bha Abhayaahudi bhakam âbh…®r…®k…®ra naatu  âm â ât â w ân â aar…®  âm âh âku, bhakam âbh â âr…®ra, ‚ÄúWiirah…®r…® kwa Mungu k âbha,  âragamba amaheene. Itw…® t âm…®nyir…® k âbha  âm â ât â w ân â aak âh âriry…®, n…®‚Äëm âk âri w â  âbh âbh…®.‚Äù
JOH 9:25 Ewe akabhagarukirya, ‚ÄúIny…® n…®t…®…®z…® ar…®…®bh…®  âm â ât â wuyo n…®‚Äëm âk âri w â  âbh âbh…®, nawe n…®…®z…® ekegero k…®mw…®bhu. Naar…®  âm âh âku, nawe nang â n…®rarora.‚Äù

JOH 13:1 Mmbe han â isigukuru y…® ∆ópasaka yaar…® …®k…®…®r…® kuhika, Y…®…®su akamenya ribhaga ryaz…® ryu ukurwa k â âs…® kuja kwa Wiis…® rihikir…®. Y…®…®su aar…® abhas…®…®gir…® abhaat â bhaaz…® bhan â bhaar…® k â âs…®, na akabhas…®…®ga kuhika …®t…®n…®r â.
JOH 13:2 Y…®…®su na abh…®…®ga bhaaz…® bhakiikara kurya ibhyakurya bhya rigoroobha. Ribhaga riyo, Sh…®taani aar…® amarir…® kokorokomba Yuuda, umwana wa Sim â âni Isikariy â âti, korereke ich âr…® Y…®…®su.

ACT 4:1 Han â Peetero na Yoohana bhaar…® bhak…®…®r…® bharabharagan ºya abhaat â bharya …®ng ºana ya Mungu, abhakuhaani na abhariibhi bha rihekaaru na Abhasadukaayo bhan â bhaar…® hayo, bhakahika.

ACT 5:1 Aar…® areho  âm â ât â w âmw…® iriina ryaz…® Ananiya, n â  âm âkari waaz…® aar…® arabhirikirwa Safiira. Bhakagurya emenyo yaabh â.

ACT 5:18 Bhakagwata abhatumwa bhayo, bhakabhat â âra mokebhoho.

ACT 5:20 ‚ÄúMogende mwim…®…®r…®r…® mwihekaaru, m âbhabh â âr…®r…® abhaat â amang ºana g â âsi ig âr â w â  âbh âh âru ubhuhya bh ân â!‚Äù
ACT 5:21 Han â abhatumwa bhayo bhiigwir…®, bhakamweza ritabh â âri bhakaja mwihekaaru, bhakatanga kwija abhaat â. Han â kuhaani  âm âk âr â hamw…®mw…® na abhak…®ndichaz…® bhaahikir…®, bhakabh…®r…®k…®ra abhak âr â bh â âsi bha Abhiizira…®ri, bhahunan…® kuchandar â. Bhakat âma abhariibhi mokebhoho, korereke bhareete abhatumwa.
ACT 5:22 Nawe han â abhariibhi bhayo bhaasikiir…®, bhataabhw…®n…® abhatumwa bhayo mokebhoho. Bhakagar âka k âbhak âr â, bhakabhabh â âr…®ra,
ACT 5:23 ‚ÄúHan â twahikir…® kunyumba ye ekebhoho, t âkabhona ibhisik â bhyig…®…®r…® bhwaheene, abhariibhi bhiimiiriir…® ig ât â wi ibhisik â, han â twigwir…® ibhisik â, t âtabhw…®n…® m â ât â w âw â âsi mokebhoho muyo!‚Äù
ACT 5:24 …Ñm âk âr â wa abhariibhi bha rihekaaru na abhak âr â bha abhakuhaani han â bhiigwir…® gayo, bhakatama kwobhoora, bhakiibhuurya, ‚ÄúRing ºana riyo r…®rabhabhw…®?‚Äù
ACT 5:25 Akaaza  âm â ât â w âmw…®, akabhabh â âr…®ra, ‚ÄúMunyiitegeerere! Abhaat â bhan â mwigariir…® mokebhoho, nangw…®n â bhari mwihekaaru! Bhariija abhaat â.‚Äù
ACT 5:26 Neho  âm âk âr â wa abhariibhi wuyo, hamw…®mw…® na abhariibhi bhaaz…®, bhakaja k âbhatumwa bhayo, bhakabhareeta. Nawe bhataabhagwatir…® kwa nguru, k â k âbha bhak â âbhaha kotemwa amabhw…® na abhaat â.
ACT 5:27 Han â bhabhar…®…®tir…® kuchandar â cha abhak âr â bhayo, kuhaani  âm âk âr â akabhabhuurya,
ACT 5:28 ‚ÄúT âmarir…® k âbharecha kwa nguru k âbha mutig…® kwija abhaat â ig âr â wi iriina ry â  âm â ât â wuyo! Nawe imw…® m ârang ºeha kwija abhaat â amang ºana gaanyu mbaara z â âsi za Y…®rusar…®…®mu, naatu moreenda koreeta …®k…®saah…® ch â  âm â ât â wuyo ig âr â w…®…®t â!‚Äù
ACT 5:29 Peetero na abhatumwa abhand…® bhakam âgarukirya, ‚ÄúToreenderwa k âs â âka Mungu, k âk…®ra abhaat â.
ACT 5:30 Imw…® mukiita Y…®…®su k â k âm âbhamba k âm âsarabha, nawe Mungu wa abhas â âk âr â akamury âra.
ACT 5:31 Mungu akam âg ânga n â  âk âm ât â âra  âr âbhaara rwaz…® rwu ubhury â, abh…® …Ñm âkangati n â …Ñm âsabhuri, abhah…® Abhiizira…®ri korereke bhatig…®  âbh âbh…® bhwabh â, bhabheererwe.
ACT 5:32 Itw…® n…®‚Äëbham…®ny…®…®k…®r…®ri bha gayo g â âsi, hamw…®mw…® ne Ekoro ∆ónd…®ndu, y…®n â Mungu abhah…®…®r…® bhan â bhakumwigwa.‚Äù
ACT 5:33 Abhak âr â bhayo han â bhiigwir…® gayo, bhakiigatana bh âk âng ºu, bhakiiseemerya kwita abhatumwa bhayo.
ACT 5:34 Nawe muchandar â hayo, aar…® areho …Ñm âfarisaayo w âmw…®, iriina ryaz…® Gamari…®ri. Gamari…®ri wuyo aar…® umwija wi imigir â na aar…® arasuukwa na abhaat â bh â âsi. Akiim…®…®r…®ra, akaswaja k âbha, abhatumwa bhahurukibhw…® ig ât â kwibhaga iguh…®.
ACT 5:35 Ak âmara akabhabh â âr…®ra abhak âr â abhak…®ndichabh â, ‚ÄúAbhahiiri bhaan…® Abhiizira…®ri, hinga mwiyangar…®r…®, k âr…®n â mukwenda kokora k âbhaat â bhan â!
ACT 5:36 Mwiseege zisik â z…®n â zaahitir…®, akabhoneka  âm â ât â w âmw…®, iriina ryaz…® T…®uda, aar…® ariikora k âbha n…®‚Äëm â ât â m âk âr â, akabhona abhah…®mba magana ane, bhakagwatana neewe. Nawe m ât…®n…®r â akiitwa, na abhah…®mba bhaaz…® bh â âsi bhakanyaragana na k âbh âra.
ACT 5:37 Ribhaga r…®kah…®ta, abhaat â bhaar…® bharabharwa endengo yaabh â, akabhoneka Yuuda …Ñm âgariraaya, w â âsi akabharuta abhaat â bhakamutuna. Nawe w â âsi akiitwa, abhah…®mba bhaaz…® bhakanyaragana.
ACT 5:38 ‚ÄúMmbe n…®rabhabh â âr…®ra, mutigan…® na abhaat â bhan â. Mutig…® k âbhakorera ry âry âsi ibh…®, k â k âbha ar…®…®bh…® emeremo jabh â g…®n â g…®tangirw…® na abhaat â, g…®rasira ijene.
ACT 5:39 Nawe ar…®…®bh…® ne‚Äëmeremo ja Mungu, m âtak ât âra k âbharecha, m ârabhona muriitana na Mungu umwene.‚Äù
ACT 5:40 Bhakiisirirya amang ºana gaaz…®, bhakabhabh…®r…®k…®ra abhatumwa muchandar â. Bhakatemwa zihimb â nzaru, ak âmara bhakabharecha bhatig…® k âbhabh â âr…®ra abhaat â kuriina rya Y…®…®su, bhakabhatig âr âk…®ra.
ACT 5:41 Abhatumwa bhayo bhakarwa kuchandar â kiyo bhaz âm…®…®rw…®, k â k âbha Mungu akabhaha ubhusuuku kukusuukibhwa kuriina rya Y…®…®su.
ACT 5:42 Bhakakaja kwija na kurwaz…®ra mwihekaaru na muzinyumba za abhaat â sik â z â âsi amang ºana amaz âmu k âbha, Y…®…®su newe Kiriisit â.
ACT 6:1 Kuzisik â ziyo, endengo ya abh…®…®ga bha Y…®…®su yaar…® …®rakaja kwaruha. Gat…® waabh â bhaar…® bharimu Abhayaahudi bhan â bhaar…® bhak âgamba Ikigiriki, na Abhayaahudi bhan â bhaar…® bhak âgamba ∆ók…®…®bhuraaniya. Bharya bhaar…® bhak âgamba Ikigiriki bhakiibheerya k âbha, abhakwirwa bhaabh â bhah…®…®bhwa kosondo yi ibhyakurya bhya k…®rakabhu.
ACT 6:2 K âgayo, abhatumwa ikumi na bhabh…®r…® bhakabhiringa abh…®…®ga bh â âsi, bhakabhabh â âr…®ra, ‚Äú∆ótar…® bhwaheene itw…® tutig…® kwija …®ng ºana ya Mungu, k â k âbha yo okosondya abhaat â ibhyakurya.
ACT 6:3 Nang â abhahiiri bh…®…®t â, morobhore abhasubh…® muhungat…® k âbhaniimw…®, bhan â bham…®ny…®k…®…®n…® k âbha bhaana ubhukumya  âbh âz âmu, bhiizwirw…® Ekoro ∆ónd…®ndu nu ubhw âbh â âri, t âbhah…® emeremo giyo.
ACT 6:4 Itw…® t ârahocha kwa k âsabha Mungu na kwija abhaat â …®ng ºana yaaz…®.‚Äù
ACT 6:5 Ring ºana riyo r…®kabhazomera abhiisirirya bhayo bh â âsi. Bhakarobhora Sit…®faan â,  âm â ât â w ân â iizwir…® Ekoro ∆ónd…®ndu nu ubhwisirirya  âbh âk âr â, bhakarobhora Firip â, P âr âk â âr â, N…®kan â âri, Tiim âni, Parimeena, na Nikorao wa Antiy âkiya, w ân â isiriiry…® …®nyangi y…® ∆ók…®yaahudi.
ACT 6:6 Bhakabhareeta abhaat â bhayo m âbh âtang…® bhwa abhatumwa. Abhatumwa bhakabhasabh…®ra na k âbhateera amabhoko k âbhaha  âr âbhang â.
ACT 6:7 ∆óng ºana ya Mungu …®kakaja k ânyaragana k âbhaat â. Ne endengo ya abh…®…®ga bha Y…®…®su …®kaaruha bh âk âng ºu Y…®rusar…®…®mu na abhakuhaani bhaaru bhakiigwa Y…®…®su.
ACT 6:8 Sit…®faan â aar…® arakora amateemo ni ibhy…®r…®k…®n ºy â k âbhaat â, k â k âbha aar…® n…® …®bh…®g ângi bhyaru na zinguru nzaru kurwa kwa Mungu.
ACT 6:9 Nawe bhakabhoneka abhaat â korereke bhahakaan…® na Sit…®faan â. Abhaat â bhayo ni bha rirwaz…®r â y…®n â ikubhirikirwa Rirwaz…®r â ya Abhaat â Bhan â Bhatigurukiirw…®, bhayo bhakarwa Kireene, Ar…®kizandiriya, Kirikiya na Asiya.

ACT 6:11 Neho bhakakorokomba abhaat â abhand…®, bhagamb…®  âr âr…®m…® k âbha, ‚ÄúTwigwir…® Sit…®faan â aragamba amang ºana amabh…® ig âr â wa Musa na Mungu.‚Äù
ACT 6:12 K âmagamba gaabh â gayo bhakasiigirirya abhaat â, abhakaruka bha Abhayaahudi na abhiija bhi imigir â. Bhakag…®…®ra Sit…®faan â, bhakamugwata, bhakamuhira kuchandar â cha abhak âr â bha Abhayaahudi.
ACT 6:13 Bhakareeta abham…®ny…®…®k…®r…®ri bh â  âr âr…®m…®, bhakagamba amang ºana g â  âr âr…®m…® ig âr â wa Sit…®faan â, ‚ÄúZisik â z â âsi  âm â ât â w ân â aragamba amang ºana amabh…® ig âr â wa rihekaaru rir…®ndu r…®n â ni ig âr â wi imigir â ja Musa!
ACT 6:14 Tumwigwir…® arabhuga, Y…®…®su …Ñm ânazar…®…®ti arasarya ahagero han â na arach âra amanar â g…®…®t â garya Musa aat âh…®…®r…®.‚Äù
ACT 6:15 Abhaat â bh â âsi kuchandar â …®k…®k âr â kiyo, bhakamogorera Sit…®faan â bh âk âng ºu, bhakarora ubhush â bhwaz…® bhutuubh…®…®n…® nu ubhush â bhwa maraika.
ACT 7:1 Neho kuhaani  âm âk âr â akabhuurya Sit…®faan â, ‚ÄúG â âsi gan â bhagambir…®, heene n…®mbu gar…®?‚Äù
ACT 7:2 Sit…®faan â akabhuga, ‚ÄúBhabhaabha na abhahiiri bh…®…®t â, munyiitegeerere! Mungu umugungwa akahwar âk…®ra s â âk âr â Abhurahaamu muchar â cha Mesopotaamiya, han â aar…® ak…®…®r…® k âsaam…®ra k âr âbh…®ri rwa Haraani.

ACT 7:4 Neho Abhurahaamu akasaama muchar â chaz…® cha Abhakaridaay â, akaja kwikara Haraani. Han â wiis…® aakuur…®, Mungu akam âsaamya, akamoreeta muchar â k…®n â mukwikaramu nangw…®n â.
ACT 7:5 ‚ÄúMungu ataagabhiry…® Abhurahaamu n â âr â k…®t…®n…®ka kisuuhu cha ahagero kuchar â k ân â. Nawe akam âragan ºya, aramoha ahagero habh…® ahaaz…® na hu urwibh âr â rwaz…®, nangabha ribhaga riyo ataar…® na mwana.
ACT 7:6 Mungu akabh â âr…®ra Abhurahaamu, ‚ÄòAbhaat â bhu urwibh âr â rwaz â bhariikara mubhugini kuchar â cha abhand…®, abhaat â bhi ichar â kiyo bharabhakora k âbha bhamb â âsa. Na bharanyaakibhwa kwi imyaka magana ane.

ACT 7:8 Ak âmara Mungu akakora  âbh ârag…® na Abhurahaamu bhw â  âk âsaara abhaana bh â âsi bhi ikisubh…®. Abhurahaamu akiibh âra Iisaka, akam âsaara urusik â rwa kanaan…® rwu ukwibhurwa kwaz…®. ACT 7:9 ‚ÄúAbhakaruka bh…®…®t â bhayo bhakarorera Yuusufu eng ºeera, bhakamugurya abh…® omohocha, muchar â cha Miisiri. Nawe Mungu aar…® hamw…®mw…® na Yuusufu,
ACT 7:10 akam âsabh âra kurwa m ânyaak â yaaz…® y â âsi. Akamoha ubhw âbh â âri n â  âk âs…®…®gwa m âbh âtang…® bhwa Farao,  âm ât…®mi wa Miisiri, ewe akamoha  âbh âkangati  âbh âk âr â muchar â cha Miisiri nu umwimiiririri wi inyumba yaaz…® y â âsi y…® …®k…®t…®mi.
ACT 7:11 ‚ÄúAk âmara …®kabhoneka …®nzara haari m â âs…® y â âsi ya Miisiri na Kanaani, y…®n â yagiriry…® …®nyaak â …®nzaru, bhabhaabha bh…®…®t â bhataabhw…®n…® ibhyakurya bhya kwisa.

ACT 7:13 Korogendo rwabh â rwa kabh…®r…®, Yuusufu akiitonda k âbhahiiri bhaaz…®, abhahiiri bhaaz…® bh â âsi bhakamenyekana kwa Farao.

ACT 7:17 ‚ÄúRibhaga r…®n â Mungu aarag…®…®n ºy…® Abhurahaamu han â ryar…® r…®raariir…® kuhika, endengo ya Abhiizira…®ri …®kakaja kohera bh âk âng ºu Miisiri.

ACT 7:19 …Ñm ât…®mi wuyo akabhakorera amabh…® k â  âk âbhakangirirya abhaat â bh…®…®t â, naatu akabhanyaacha na k âbhanyahaara kwa kobheenda bhabharekere abhaana bhaabh â abhabhataar…®, korereke bhakw…®.
ACT 7:20 ‚ÄúRibhaga riyo Musa akiibhurwa, ewe aar…® m âz âmu bh âk âng ºu, akarerwa kwibhaga rya my…®ri …®tat â munyumba ya wiis…®.

ACT 7:30 ‚ÄúImyaka emerongo ene g…®n â gihitir…® Musa aar…® Midiyani, akahwarukirwa na maraika w â …Ñm âk âr â, aar…® k âk…®bhara haguh…® n…® …®k…®g âr â cha Sinayi. Maraika wuyo aar…® m âk…®saka k…®n â char…® k…®raaka omorero.

ACT 7:32 ‚ÄòIny…® niiny…® Mungu wa bhas â âk âr â bhaanyu, Mungu wa Abhurahaamu, Iisaka na Yaakobho!‚Äô Han â Musa iigwir…® gayo, akatanga kurigita, ak â âbhaha korora …®k…®saka kiyo.
ACT 7:33 ‚Äú…Ñm âk âr â Mungu akam âbh â âr…®ra, ‚ÄòRuusha ibhikw…®ra bhyaz â, k â k âbha han â ukwim…®…®r…®ra n…®‚Äëhar…®ndu.
ACT 7:34 Amaheene n…®r â âz…® …®nyaak â ya abhaat â bhaan…® bhan â bhar…® Miisiri, niigwir…® …®k…®r…®r â chabh â, niikir…® kurwa mwisaar â k âbhatuurya. Nang â n…®rak ât âma Miisiri.‚Äô
ACT 7:35 ‚ÄúMusa wuyo newe abhaat â bha Izira…®ri bhaangir…® bharam âbh â âr…®ra, ‚ÄòN…®‚Äëw…®…®w…® w ân â ak ât…®…®r…®  âbh…®  âm âkangati w…®…®t â nu umutiniri w…®…®t â?‚Äô Mungu atumir…® Musa abh…®  âm âkangati waabh â n â  âm âsabhuri waabh â, k ânz…®ra ya maraika w ân â aamuhwarukiir…® m âk…®saka kirya!
ACT 7:36 Ak âmara Musa akabhakangata bharw…® …®…®s…® ya Miisiri, kwa kokora amateemo ni ibhy…®r…®k…®n ºy â bhyaru k â âs…® ya Miisiri, m ânyanza ya Shamu, na k âk…®bhara, kwibhaga ryi imyaka merongo ene.
ACT 7:37 ‚ÄúMusa wuyo newe aabhuuriir…® Abhiizira…®ri, ‚ÄòM âbhahiiri bhaanyu Mungu ariimiirirya  âm âr â ât…®r…®ri ncha niiny…®. Mumwitegeerere k âgan â g â âsi araabhabh â âr…®r…®.‚Äô
ACT 7:38 Musa newe aar…® hamw…®mw…® na bhas â âk âr â k âk…®bhara na newe w ân â aagambir…® na maraika wa Mungu k âk…®g âr â cha Sinayi, newe akas âng ºaana amang ºana g â  âbh âh âru, korereke at âbh â âr…®r…® itw…®.

ACT 9:13 Nawe Ananiya akam âgarukirya, ‚Äú…Ñm âk âr â, abhaat â bhaaru bhambuuriir…® ch…®mbu Sauri wuyo aabhak âr…®…®r…® amabh…® abhar…®ndu bhaaz â Y…®rusar…®…®mu!
ACT 9:14 Na nang â ar…® han â, an â  âbh ânaja kurwa k âbhak âr â bha abhakuhaani, abhagwat…® bh â âsi bhan â bhak âsabha kuriina ryaz â.‚Äù

ACT 10:41 Atar âr…®k…®…®n…® k âbhaat â bh â âsi, kuruushaku k âbhan â Mungu aar…® amarir…® korobhora k âbha abham…®ny…®…®k…®r…®ri. Abham…®ny…®…®k…®r…®ri bhayo ni‚Äëtw…®, t âkamorora, t âkarya na kunywa hamw…®mw…® neewe han â aryukir…® kurwa m âbhaku.

ACT 14:28 Bhakiikara Antiy âkiya hayo hamw…®mw…® na abh…®…®ga bhayo kwibhaga ir…®…®hu.
ACT 15:1 Abhaat â obhorebhe bhakarwa Yudeya, bhakahiringit…®ra k âr âbh…®ri rwa Antiy âkiya ya Siiriya. Bhakiija abhiisirirya bharabhuga, ‚ÄúM âr…®…®tam…® k âsaarwa k âr…®ng ºaana na amanar â gan â twatigiirw…® na Musa, m âtak ât âra k âsabh âka.‚Äù
ACT 15:2 Ring ºana riyo r…®kagirya Paaur â na Bharinaabha bhaang…® abhaat â bhayo, na k âgambana nabh â k âbh âhaari bh âk âng ºu. Abhaat â bha risengerero rya Antiy âkiya, bhakeenda k ât âma Paaur â na Bharinaabha hamw…®mw…® na abhaat â obhorebhe gat…® waabh â, bhaj…® Y…®rusar…®…®mu k âgamb…®ra ring ºana riyo k âbhatumwa bha Y…®…®su na abhiimiiririri bha risengerero rya Mungu.
ACT 15:3 Abhaat â bha risengerero bhayo bhakabharaga, neho bhakah…®ta kubhyar â bhya F âinik…® na Samaariya, bhakabha bhararagan ºya abhaat â ch…®mbu abhaat â bhan â bhatar…® Abhayaahudi bhiisiriiry…® Y…®…®su. ∆óng ºana yiyo …®kabhazomera bh âk âng ºu abhiisirirya abhak…®ndichabh â bh â âsi bhi iyo.
ACT 15:4 Paaur â na abhak…®ndichaz…® bhayo, han â bhaahikir…® Y…®rusar…®…®mu, bhakas âng ºaanwa bhwaheene na abhatumwa bha Y…®…®su, abhiimiiririri na Abhakiriisit â abhand…® bha risengerero rya Mungu. Paaur â na abhak…®ndichaz…® bhakabhabh â âr…®ra g â âsi gan â Mungu ak ârir…® k â k âh…®t…®ra ebho.
ACT 15:5 Nawe abhiisirirya obhorebhe bha riribhita rya Abhafarisaayo bhakiim…®…®r…®ra, bhakabhuga, ‚ÄúBhan â bhatar…® Abhayaahudi bh â âsi ereenderwa bhasaarw…®, na kugwata imigir â ja Musa.‚Äù
ACT 15:6 Abhatumwa bha Y…®…®su na abhiimiiririri bhayo, bhakakora ichandar â korereke bhiiseege bhwaheene ring ºana riyo.
ACT 15:7 Han â bhaag…®gir…® ibhaga ir…®…®hu k âhakaana neebho, Peetero akiim…®…®r…®ra, akabhabh â âr…®ra, ‚ÄúImw…® abhahiiri bh…®…®t â, mw…®z…® k âbha kw…®ma …®kar…® Mungu akandobhora k âbhaniimw…®, korereke abhaat â bhan â bhatar…® Abhayaahudi bhabhone kubhuurirwa ∆óng ºana ∆ónz âmu ig âr â wa Y…®…®su k âh…®t…®ra kwa niiny…®, kuhika bhakiisirirya Y…®…®su.
ACT 15:8 Mungu newe y…®…®z…® mozekoro za abhaat â, akeereken ºya k âbha, bhan â bhatar…® Abhayaahudi arabhiisirirya k â k âbhaha Ekoro ∆ónd…®ndu, ch…®mbu at âh…®…®r…® itw…®.
ACT 15:9 Ataak ârir…® k…®mb âr â âri ch âch âsi gat…® y…®…®t â neebho, k â k âbha ebho bh â âsi bhiisiriiry…® Y…®…®su, na akabh…®ngukya zekoro zaabh â.
ACT 15:10 Ndora nang â moreenda kogema Mungu, ko kogegya abh…®…®ga bhan â bhatar…® Abhayaahudi bhayo imirig â g…®n â gik ât âtama itubheene, na bhas â âk âr â bh…®…®t â gikabhatama kogega.
ACT 15:11 Itw…® turiisirirya k âbha, …®bh…®g ângi bhy â …Ñm âk âr â w…®…®t â Y…®…®su Kiriisit â t ârasabhurwa, ch…®mbu ebho bhaasabhwirw…®.‚Äù
ACT 15:12 Neho abhaat â bh â âsi bhakakira kiri, Bharinaabha na Paaur â bhakagamba ch…®mbu Mungu aar…® areereken ºya ibhy…®r…®k…®n ºy â na amateemo maaru gat…® wa abhaat â bhan â bhatar…® Abhayaahudi k âh…®t…®ra ebho.
ACT 15:13 Han â bhaamarir…® k âgamba, Yaakobho w â âsi akabhuga, ‚ÄúImw…® abhahiiri bhaan…®, munyiitegeerere!
ACT 15:14 Peetero atubhuuriir…® ch…®mbu Mungu abhasakiiry…® abhaat â bhi ibhyar â …®bh…®nd…®, korobhora abhaat â abhand…® m âbhayo, bhabh…® abhaat â bhaaz…®.
ACT 15:15 Amang ºana gan â n…®‚Äëmamw…®mw…® na gan â gaandikirw…® na abhar â ât…®r…®ri m âMaand…®k â Amar…®ndu k âbha,
ACT 15:16 ‚Äò…Ñm âk âr â aagambir…®, ‚ÄúGan â gar…®…®h…®t…®, n…®ragar âka, n…®r â âmbaka inyumba ya Daudi y…®n â igwir…®. N…®r â âmbaka naatu amatuturi gaaz…® gan â garikiibhw…®, n…®ragiimiirirya bhuhya,
ACT 15:17 korereke abhaat â bhan â bhatar…® Abhayaahudi bhaamonhy…®, bh â âsi bhan â nabhabhirikiir…® bhabh…® abhaat â bhaan…®. Amang ºana gan â, iny…® n…®ragakora.‚Äù
ACT 15:18 N…®mbu akubhuga …Ñm âk âr â w ân â akomenyeekererya gayo kw…®ma …®kar…®.‚Äô‚Äù
ACT 15:19 Yaakobho akang ºeha k âgamba, ‚ÄúIg âr â wa gayo, iny…® n…®rarora k âbha t âtanyaacha bhan â bhakwich âr…®ra Mungu.
ACT 15:20 Nawe t âbhaand…®k…®r…® amaand…®k â k âbhabh â âr…®ra bhatarya ibhyakurya bh…®n â bh…®s…®ng…®…®rw…® amasambwa, bhatakora …®taar â, bhatarya …®nyama yi ikity…®nyi k…®n â k…®ng º…®…®tirw…®, bhatarya na bhatanywa amasaah…®.
ACT 15:21 T âkabhabh â âr…®ra k â k âbha kw…®ma …®kar…® imigir â ja Musa jar…® giriijibhwa z…®mb…®ri z â âsi, na jar…® g…®rasomwa m âmarwaz…®r â zisik â z â âsi z â  âbh ât â âr â.‚Äù
ACT 15:22 Abhatumwa bhayo, abhiimiiririri, hamw…®mw…® na risengerero igima rya Y…®rusar…®…®mu hayo, bhakiisiriran ºya bhakat…®na ikiina k âbha, bharobhore abhaat â obhorebhe gat…® waabh â bhan â bhakuja hamw…®mw…® na Paaur â na Bharinaabha k âr âbh…®ri rwa Antiy âkiya ya Siiriya. Gat…® waabh â, bhakarobhora bhasubh…® bhabh…®r…® bhan â bhakusuukwa bh âk âng ºu. We embere aar…® ni‚ÄëYuuda w ân â aabhirikiirw…® Bharisaabha, wa kabh…®r…® aar…® ni‚ÄëSiira. Bhakatumwa na amaand…®k â gan â:
ACT 15:23 ‚ÄúItw…® abhatumwa na abhiimiiririri bha risengerero ni‚Äëbhiisirirya abhak…®ndichanyu, t ârabhakeerya imw…® bhan â m âtar…® Abhayaahudi, bhan â m âr…® k âr âbh…®ri rwa Antiy âkiya, na k â âs…® ya Siiriya, na k â âs…® ya Kirikiya.
ACT 15:24 Twigwir…® k âbha, abhak…®ndich…®t â bhakabhabh â âr…®ra amang ºana g â  âk âbhahabhya, naatu g â  âk ânyaacha zekoro zaanyu. Nawe itw…® t âtaabhatumir…®, bhakabh â âka abheene.
ACT 15:25 K âr…®ng ºaana na gayo, itw…® twisirir…®…®n ºy…® k âbha, torobhore abhaat â bhan â t âraaz…® k âbhat âma iyo, bhaaz…® hamw…®mw…® na abhas…®…®gwa bh…®…®t â Bharinaabha na Paaur â.
ACT 15:26 Bhakat â âra ubhwikari bhwabh â ahabh…® ig âr â wi iriina ry â …Ñm âk âr â w…®…®t â Y…®…®su Kiriisit â.
ACT 15:27 ‚ÄúT ârat âma Yuuda na Siira kwa niimw…®, bhan â nebho bharaabhabh â âr…®r…® amang ºana gan â t âbhaandikiir…®.
ACT 15:28 ∆ókatozomera itw…® ne Ekoro ∆ónd…®ndu, t âtabhiitwicha umurig â  âg ând…® k âk…®ra imigir â g…®n â gikwenderwa.
ACT 15:29 M âtarya ibhyakurya bh…®n â bh…®s…®ng…®…®rw…® amasambwa, m âtanywa amasaah…®, m âtarya …®nyama yi ikity…®nyi k…®n â k…®ng º…®…®tirw…®, na m âtakora …®taar â. Han â muriitig…® gayo, neho m âk âbha m âk ârir…® bhwaheene. M âbh…® no omorembe.‚Äù
ACT 15:30 Han â abhatumwa bhayo bhaaragirw…® na abhak…®ndichabh â, bhakahiringit…®ra Antiy âkiya. Bhakabhiringa abhaat â bha risengerero rya Antiy âkiya, bhakabhaha amaand…®k â garya.
ACT 15:31 Han â abhaat â bhayo bhaamarir…® k âgasoma, bhakazomerwa ig âr â w â  âk âbhaha umw ây â.

ACT 15:33 R…®kah…®ta ibhaga irebhe, abhiisirirya bhayo bhakabhiisiririrya k âbha bhagar âk…® Y…®rusar…®…®mu komorembe k âbhaat â bhan â bhaabhatumir…®. [
ACT 15:34 Nawe Siira umwene akarora k âbha, n…®‚Äëbhwaheene asaag…® haryaharya.]
ACT 15:35 Na Paaur â na Bharinaabha bh â âsi bhakasaagayo, hamw…®mw…® na abhaat â abhand…® bhi iyo, bhakabha bhariija na kurwaz…®ra abhaat â …®ng ºana y â …Ñm âk âr â.
ACT 15:36 Z…®kah…®ta sik â suuhu, Paaur â akabh â âr…®ra Bharinaabha, ‚ÄúT âgar âk…® k âz…®mb…®ri z…®n â twijiry…® …®ng ºana y â …Ñm âk âr â, t âbhataar…®r…® abhiisirirya abhak…®ndich…®t â, korereke torore amagenderero gaabh â.‚Äù
ACT 15:37 Korogendo ruyo, Bharinaabha aar…® areenda bhagege Yoohana w ân â aar…® arabhirikirwa Maaroko, aj…® hamw…®mw…® neebho.
ACT 15:38 Nawe Paaur â akarora k âbha, …®tar…® bhwaheene bhaj…® hamw…®mw…® neewe, k â k âbha ewe aar…® abhatigir…® k â âs…® ya Pamufiiriya, akaanga kokora emeremo hamw…®mw…® nabh â.
ACT 15:39 Gayo gakagirya Paaur â na Bharinaabha bh â âman…® bh âk âng ºu, kuhik…®ra bhakataana. Bharinaabha akagega Maaroko, bhakaja kubhwat â hamw…®mw…® bhakahika kwiginga rya Kipur â.
ACT 15:40 Paaur â akarobhora Siira, han â abhiisirirya abhak…®ndichabh â bhaamarir…® k âm âsabh…®ra abh…® n…® …®bh…®g ângi bhy â …Ñm âk âr â, akabh â âka kuja.
ACT 15:41 Akaja k â âs…® ya Siiriya na Kirikiya, akabha arakandikija amasengerero.
ACT 16:1 Paaur â akaja k âr âbh…®ri rwa D…®ribh…® na rwa Riisitira, iyo aareho umw…®ga w âmw…® wa Y…®…®su, iriina ryaz…® Timoseo. Unina aar…® M âyaahudi w ân â isiriiry…® Y…®…®su, nawe wiis…® aar…® Mugiriki.

ACT 16:7 Han â bhaahikir…® k âbh âtaan…®r â bhu ukusik…®ra …®…®s…® ya Miisiya, bhakagema kusik…®ra k â âs…® ya Bhisiniya, nawe Ekoro ya Y…®…®su …®tabhiisiririiry…®.
ACT 16:8 Bhakarora bhah…®t…® k â âs…® ya Miisiya, bhakahiringita kuja k âr âbh…®ri rwa Turowa.
ACT 16:9 Ubhutik â Paaur â akarora  âbh âr âri. Akarora  âm â ât â w âmw…® wi ichar â cha Mak…®d âniya imiiriir…®, akamwisasaama bh âk âng ºu akubhuga, ‚ÄúYamb âka …®nyanza uuz…® Mak…®d âniya,  ât âsakiry…®.‚Äù

ACT 16:11 Mmbe, t âkarwa Turowa nu ubhwat â t âkahika mwiginga rya Sam âtiraak…®. Han â bhw…®rir…®, t âkaja N…®yap â âri.

ACT 16:13 Urusik â rw â  âbh ât â âr â t âkah âr âka ig ât â w â  âr âbh…®ri t âkaja rusiz â w…® …®k…®taar â, tukiiseega k âbha neho twangabhw…®n…® abhaat â bharasabha Mungu. T âkabhona abhakari obhorebhe bhiibhiringir…®, t âkagambana nabh â.
ACT 16:14 Gat…® wa bhan â bhaar…® bhakutwitegeerera, aar…® arimu  âm âkari kurwa  âr âbh…®ri rwa Tiyatiira, iriina ryaz…® Riidiya. ACT 16:16 Rusik â r âmw…® han â twar…® t âraja ahagero han â bhahaasengera Mungu, t âkahunana nu umuucha w âmw…® mb â âsa. Umuucha wuyo aar…® ana risambwa ry â  âk ârag âra korora amang ºana gan â gakuuza. K ânz…®ra y â  âbh âgabh â, abhak âr â bhaaz…® bhaar…® bharabhona zimpirya nzaru.

ACT 16:23 Han â bhaamarir…® kotemwa, bhakatuurwa mokebhoho, umuriibhi wa munyumba ye ekebhoho, akaswajibhwa k âbha abhariibh…® kandikija.
ACT 16:24 K âr…®ng ºaana na amaswaja gayo, umuriibhi wuyo akabhasikirya …®gat…®, akabhabhoha amag âr â.

ACT 16:26 Rogendo r âmw…® k âkabha ni ikirigit â k…®k âr â bh âk âng ºu, …®…®s…® …®kasingisha …®tang…® yi inyumba ye ekebhoho. Hayohayo ibhisik â bhy âsi bhikiig âka ibhy…®n…®bhu, ne emenyororo g…®n â bhaar…® bhabhabh âh…®…®r…® g…®kataz âka.
ACT 16:27 Umuriibhi wi inyumba ye ekebhoho wuyo akabh â âka. Han â aar â âz…® k âbha ibhisik â bhyigukir…®, akakina k âbha abhabhohwa bh â âsi bhang º âsir…®. Akasohora …®panga yaaz…® kwenda kwiyita.
ACT 16:28 Nawe Paaur â akahurucha riraka akam âbh â âr…®ra, ‚ÄúUtiiyita! Turimu itw âsi!‚Äù
ACT 16:29 Umuriibhi wuyo akat âman ºya …®k…®m âr…® kereetwe. Akasik…®ra munyumba, akagwa m âbh âtang…® bhwa Paaur â na Siira …®n â ararigita.
ACT 16:30 Ibhaga isuuhu umuriibhi wurya akah âr âka na Paaur â na Siira kurwa mokebhoho, akabhabhuurya, ‚ÄúAbhak âr â bhaan…®, nekorebhw…® korereke n…®sabh âk…®?‚Äù
ACT 16:31 Bhakam âgarukirya, ‚ÄúMwisiriry…® …Ñm âk âr â Y…®…®su, aw…® na abhaat â bh…® …®waaz â, neho m âraasabh âk…®.‚Äù
ACT 16:32 Paaur â na Siira bhakiija umuriibhi wuyo hamw…®mw…® na abhaat â bh…® …®waaz…® ig âr â w…® …®ng ºana y â …Ñm âk âr â.
ACT 16:33 Ribhaga ryu ubhutik â riyoriyo, umuriibhi akagega Paaur â na Siira, akooja …®bh…®ras â bhyabh â. Ak âmara akabhatiizwa hayohayo hamw…®mw…® na abhaat â bhaaz…® bh â âsi.
ACT 16:34 Akabhaginihya Paaur â na Siira …®waaz…®, akabhaha ibhyakurya. Akazomerwa bh âk âng ºu hamw…®mw…® na abhaat â bhaaz…® bh â âsi, k â k âbha bhiisiriiry…® Mungu.
ACT 16:35 Han â bhwak…®…®r…®, abhak âr â bhakat âma abhak âr â bha abhasirikar…® bhi inyumba ye ekebhoho, bhakam âbh â âr…®ra, ‚ÄúBhiig âr…®r…® abhaat â bharya.‚Äù
ACT 16:36 Neho umuriibhi wuyo akabh â âr…®ra Paaur â, ‚ÄúAbhak âr â bhatumir…® amang ºana k âbha m âtazurw…®, nang â m âh âr âk…® ig ât â, muj…® no omorembe.‚Äù
ACT 16:37 Nawe Paaur â akagarukirya abhasirikar…® bhayo akabhuga, ‚ÄúBhakatotema zihimb â habhw…®r â m âbh âtang…® bhwa abhaat â, bhatatubhuuriry…® na kutuhira m ât…®n…®r â …®n â itw…®, n…®‚ÄëBharuumi! ACT 16:38 Abhasirikar…® bharya bhakaja k âbhabh â âr…®ra abhak âr â bhayo gayo g â âsi. Han â abhak âr â bhayo bhiigwir…® k âbha Paaur â na Siira, n…®‚ÄëBharuumi, bhak â âbhaha.
ACT 16:39 Bhakaaza kubhiisasaama, bhakabharuusha mokebhoho, bhakabhasabha bharw…® k âr âbh…®ri ruyo.
ACT 16:40 Han â Paaur â na Siira bhaaruur…® mokebhoho, bhakaja wa Riidiya. Bhakahunana na abhiisirirya abhak…®ndichabh â, bhakabhaha umw ây â, ak âmara bhakabh â âka bhakaja …®n â bhaar…® bhakuja.
ACT 17:1 Paaur â na Siira bhakah…®ta k âr âbh…®ri rwa Amufip â âri, na rwa Ap âr â âniya, bhakahika k âr âbh…®ri rwa T…®sar â ânik…®, han â inyumba ya rirwaz…®r â rya Abhayaahudi yaar…®.
ACT 17:2 Paaur â akasik…®ra munyumba yiyo, k âr…®ng ºaana na amanar â gaaz…® ch…®mbu gaar…®. Kuzisik â isat â z â  âbh ât â âr â, akagambana na abhaat â amang ºana gan â gar…® m âMaand…®k â Amar…®ndu.

ACT 17:6 Han â bhaabhurirw…®, bhakagega Yas â âni hamw…®mw…® na abhiisirirya obhorebhe. Bhakabhahira m âbh âtang…® bhwa abhak âr â bh â  âr âbh…®ri, bhakagamba kwiraka ik âr â, ‚ÄúAbhaat â bhan â bhagaribhwir…® ichar â ch âsi nebho bhan â bhamarir…® kuhika k âr âbh…®ri rw…®t â han â.

ACT 19:1 Ribhaga r…®n â Apooro aar…® K ârint â, Paaur â akah…®ta k âz…®mb…®ri za m âbh…®g âr â, akahika k âr âbh…®ri rwa Efeeso. Iyo akabhabhona abh…®…®ga obhorebhe,

ACT 20:32 ‚ÄúNang â n…®rabhat â âra m âmabhoko ga Mungu, na k âmang ºana g…® …®bh…®g ângi bhyaz…®. Ewe arat âra k âbhakong ºya na k âbhaha …®gabh â hamw…®mw…® na bhan â bhabh…®ngukiibhw…®.

ACT 20:35 Kwa g â âsi gayo nak ârir…®, naar…® n…®rabheerecha k âbha toreenderwa kohocha emeremo, korereke tobhone ebhegero bhy â  âk âsakirya abhaat â bhan â bhataana  âbh ânaja. ACT 20:36 Han â Paaur â aamarir…® k âgamba amang ºana gayo, akahigama hamw…®mw…® nabh â, akasabha Mungu.

ACT 21:1 Han â twamarir…® k âragana na abhiimiiririri bha Efeeso bhayo, t âkatiira mubhwat â t âkaja kuriginga rya K â âsi. Tabh â âri waho, t âkaja kuriginga rya Roodo, na kurwa hayo, t âkaja k âr âbh…®ri rwa Pataara, …®…®s…® ya Asiya.

ACT 27:8 T âkah…®ta rusiz â kwa nyaak â, t âkahika han â hakubhirikirwa Ikihuuk â ∆ók…®z âmu, haguh…® na k âr âbh…®ri rwa Raseeya.
ACT 27:9 Twar…® tuhikiry…® sik â nzaru morogendo, na zisik â zu ukwiyima kurya zaar…® zihitir…®. K â gayo …®karorekana t âraang ºehe no orogendo ruyo, turiku kobhona …®nyaak â. Neho Paaur â akabhatongera abhak…®ndichaz…®,

ROM 1:1 ∆ónyar âbha y…®n â nandikir…® iny…® Paaur â, omohocha wa Y…®…®su Kiriisit â. Iny…® n…®kabhirikirwa n…®bh…® umutumwa waaz…®, n…®karobhorwa n…®bh…® n…®raragan ºya ∆óng ºana ∆ónz âmu kurwa kwa Mungu.

1CO 2:15 …Ñm â ât â w ân â ak âkangatwa ne Ekoro ya Mungu aragiis ânza g â âsi, nawe ewe,  âm â ât â w âw â âsi atak ât âra kumwis ânza.
1CO 2:16 Ch…®mbu Amaand…®k â Amar…®ndu gakubhuga, ‚ÄúN…®‚Äëw…®…®w…® w ân â am…®nyir…® gan â …Ñm âk âr â Mungu akwiseega? Na n…®‚Äëw…®…®w…® w ân â ak ât âra k âm âgamban ºya?‚Äù Nawe, itw…® turiiseega amang ºana ch…®mbu Kiriisit â akugiiseega.
1CO 3:1 Abhahiiri bhaan…®, han â naar…® kwa niimw…® n…®taar…® n…®ragamba na niimw…® ncha abhaat â bhan â bhak âkangatwa ne Ekoro ∆ónd…®ndu. Nawe naar…® n…®ragamba na niimw…® ncha abhaat â bhan â bhak âkangatwa na amang ºana g…® …®…®s…®, naatu ncha abhaana abhabhataar…® ku kwisirirya Kiriisit â.
1CO 3:2 Abhaana abhabhataar…® bharanywa amabheere ageene, bhatak âhabhwa ibhyakurya bhya abhaat â abhagima. ∆óbhu…®bhu na niiny…® n…®kabhaha amiija amah âh â k â k âbha mwar…® m âk…®…®r…® kokong ºa. N â âr â nangw…®n â m âk…®…®r…® kokong ºa,

2CO 2:10 Han â mokobheerera  âm â ât â wurya, na niiny…® n…®ramobheerera. Na ar…®…®bh…® rereho ring ºana r…®n â nikwenderwa komobheerera, n…®marir…® komobheerera m âbh âtang…® bhwa Kiriisit â ig âr â waanyu,

2CO 6:4 Nawe toreerecha k âmang ºana g â âsi k âbha, n…®‚Äëbhahocha bha Mungu t âr…®. T ârakorabhu kukwigumirirya bh âk âng ºu m ânyaak â na tabhaaribhaari nzaru.

2CO 6:6 Naatu turiiyeerekan ºya k âbha abhahocha bha Mungu k âbh âg âr âr âku, k âbh âm…®nyi, kubhwigumirirya k âbh âz âmu, k ânz…®ra y â  âk âkangatwa ne Ekoro ∆ónd…®ndu, k âbh âs…®…®gi bhwa amaheene
2CO 6:7 na ku kurwaza amang ºana ga amaheene. T ârakora gayo g â âsi k âmanaga ga Mungu. Eheene neyo ebheseme bhy…®t â,  âr âbhaara rwu ubhury â na rw â  âbh âm âsi.
2CO 6:8 Itw…® t ârahokerya Mungu, …®bh…® kwa koregwa, kuririirirwa hamw…® kugungibhwa. T ârarorekana k âbha abhabh…®…®hi t âr…®, nawe t âragamba amaheene.
2CO 6:9 T ârarorekana ncha bhan â bhatam…®ny…®k…®…®n…®, nawe t âm…®ny…®k…®…®n…® bhwaheene. T ârarorekana nkina t ârakwa, nawe bhah âru t âr…®. T ât…®mirw…® bh âk âng ºu, nawe t âk…®…®r…® kwitwa.
2CO 6:10 Na t ârarorekana k âbha turumikir…®, nawe ribhaga ry âsi tono obhozomerwa. T ârarorekana k âbha bhahabh…® t âr…®, nawe t âbhaniibhiry…® bhaaru. T ârarorekana k âbha t âtaana ch âch âsi, nawe tone ebhegero bhy âsi.

2CO 6:12 Itw…® t âk…®…®r…® kutiga k âbhas…®…®ga imw…®, nawe imw…® mutigir…® k ât âs…®…®ga itw…®.

2CO 6:17 Nang â …Ñm âk âr â akabhuga, ‚ÄúMurw…® gat…® waabh â, mwah âkan…® nabh â. M âtakun ºyaku kegero k…®n â k…®bh…®ngir…®, neho na niiny…® n…®k âbhas âng ºaana.‚Äù

2CO 7:1 Nang â, abhas…®…®gwa bhaan…®, Mungu arag…®…®n ºy…® amang ºana gayo g â âsi, twibh…®nguky…® k â k âtaana nu ubhubhuruuru bhw â  âm âbh…®r…® na bhwa mokoro. T âbh…® abhar…®ndu k âmang ºana g â âsi, k ânz…®ra y â  âk âs â âka Mungu.

GAL 3:5 M âmb â âr…®r…®, Mungu abhah…®…®r…® Ekoro ∆ónd…®ndu na kokora …®bh…®s…®g â gat…® waanyu k â k âbha m âkagwata imigir â ja Musa, kisha k â k âbha mukiitegeerera na kwisirirya ∆óng ºana ∆ónz âmu ig âr â wa Y…®…®su?
GAL 3:6 Mwiseege …®ng ºana ya Abhurahaamu. Amaand…®k â Amar…®ndu garabhuga, ‚ÄúAbhurahaamu akiisirirya Mungu, na Mungu akam âbhara we eheene.‚Äù
GAL 3:7 Mmbe nang â, momenye, abhaat â bhan â bhakwisirirya Mungu, nebho abhaana bha Abhurahaamu!

GAL 5:1 Kiriisit â at âh…®…®r…® ubhwiyagaaruri korereke twikar…® mubhwiyagaaruri. Nang â mwim…®…®r…®r…® bhw…®ma, mutiisirirya k âgar âka naatu m âbh âmb â âsa bhwi imigir â.

Ekoro ∆ónd…®ndu n â  âm âbh…®r…® bh…®rahakaana, ku riyo m âtakwenderwa kokora ch âch âsi k…®n â mukwenda mokore.

GAL 5:19 Mmbe, amang ºana gan â gakokorwa ig âr â wi isim âka y â  âbh âbh…® n…®‚Äëgan â: ikisimb…®, …®taar â, kokora amang ºana ga z…®s âni,
GAL 5:20 kosengera amasambwa,  âbh âr âgi, ubhubhisa, iry âmana, rihari,  âbh âr âr â, …®k…®nyaw…®…®t â,  âbh âtaaman ºya, …®k…®mb âr â âri,
GAL 5:21 eng ºeera, ubhunywi,  âm âs â âh â na amang ºana agand…® g â âsi gan â gatuubh…®…®n…® na gayo. N…®rabhabh â âr…®ra ch…®mbu namarir…® k âbhabh â âr…®ra k âbha, abhaat â bhan â bhakokora amang ºana gayo, bhatak âgabha ch âch âsi m âbh ât…®mi bhwa Mungu.
GAL 5:22 Nawe ar…®…®bh…® t ârakangatwa ne Ekoro ∆ónd…®ndu, t ârabha nu umusum â gwe Ekoro ∆ónd…®ndu. Umusum â guyo n…®‚Äëbh âs…®…®gi, obhozomerwa, omorembe, ubhwigumirirya,  âbh âz âmu, bhwerya koro, obhoronge,
GAL 5:23  âbh âny â âhu ne ekerengo. G âtareeho umugir â g ân â gukwanga amang ºana ncha gayo.
GAL 5:24 Abhaat â bhan â bhagwat…®…®n…® na Y…®…®su Kiriisit â, bhatakuhirwa k…®bh…® ni isim âka y â  âbh âbh…®, hamw…®mw…® na amiis…®…®gi gaabh â amabh…®, k â k âbha bhagabhambir…® k âm âsarabha gwa Y…®…®su.
GAL 5:25 Turiikar…® kubhwis…®gi bhwe Ekoro ∆ónd…®ndu, tutun…®  âbh âkangati bhwaz…®.
GAL 5:26 Tutiikumya bh â âha, tutiimohyaku mang ºana na kwirorera rihari.
GAL 6:1 Abhahiiri bhaan…®, m ârang ºur…®  âm âk…®ndichanyu asariry…®, imw…® bhan â m âk âkangatwa ne Ekoro ∆ónd…®ndu, momoreche na m âm âgaruch…® kwa bh âny â âhu. Nawe mwiyangar…®r…®, m âtaaza imw âsi kogemwa.
GAL 6:2 Mwiyang âr…® imirig â, hayo neho mukuhicha imigir â ja Kiriisit â.
GAL 6:3 Mmbe,  âm â ât â w âw â âsi w ân â akwirora ane enzobhooro k âk…®ra abhak…®ndichaz…®, wuyo ataana nzobhooro y ây â âsi, ariikangirirya umwene.
GAL 6:4 Itw âsi torore zeteemwa z…®…®t â itubheene. Ar…®…®bh…®  âm â ât â arakora amaz âmu, hayo arat âra kwikumirya amang ºana amaz âmu gan â ak ârir…®. Nawe atiir…®ng ºaan ºya na amang ºana gan â  âm â ât â  âw ând…® ak ârir…®,

GAL 6:6 …Ñm â ât â w ân â akwigibhwa …®ng ºana ya Mungu, amosondere umwija waaz…® ebhegero …®bh…®z âmu bh…®n â abhw…®n…®.
GAL 6:7 Mutiikangirirya, Mungu atahaaregwa. K…®n â  âm â ât â ak âhamba, necho araagese.
